The heart of the classic nike rotation. This is a really good Pegasus. I’ve ran in versions 37, 38, 39, 40, and now 41, and I have to say this is the best one yet for what it is - a mileage workhorse. This is not the fastest shoe in the market, not the most cushioned shoe in the market, nor the most supportive. However, it is responsive, relatively lightweight, and stable enough to allow you to show up and log mile after mile after mile without it feeling like a chore. Especially with the new wider toe box, this really is now the shoe for those 30 to 90 minute every day runs that allow you to build your fitness from the ground up day after day. Perfect for easy runs with strides, medium long runs, and maybe a little bit of uptempo if you’re feeling good that day. Also great for doing warmups, drills, cooldowns, and light gym work.  The only downside with this shoe is that, compared to Pegasus of the past, working out in this shoe does leave a lot to be desired. But then again, it got a lot better at long runs and recovery runs, which suggests that this really is that mileage shoe with a classic feeling for every day runs when you don’t want to overdo it.  If you don’t like ground feel and you prefer a more cruise-y / rockered ride, then I would look at the Vomero instead. And if you need a faster shoe, I would look at the Zoom Fly, Vaporfly, or Alphafly depending on your budget and your needs

Plush & Polished Sneaker. The Nike W Air Zoom Pegasus 41 is the most comfortable sneaker I’ve ever worn. I love the mesh upper fabric, it makes the shoe feel so light and flexible, especially when running. It also offers breathability that helps keep my feet dry. The shoe has extra padding that make slipping into them and the feeling against your heel super soft and comfortable. It’s also padded against the tongue, which adds to the plush feel. It has a rubber sole with a waffle pattern that feels like it’s got a good grip on the pavement or any slippery surface. It has a bounce to it that Nike calls responsive cushioning, it feels almost springy when moving and seems to reduce fatigue on my feet for an active day.  The shoe is very light and I love the stylish all black look from the fabric to the sole. And last but certainly not least, the foam is designed to reduce the carbon footprint so it’s better for your feet and the planet. My favorite part is that it passes for an every day shoe from work to working out

Comfortable and. Product Testing Review: W Air Zoom Pegasus 41  The W Air Zoom Pegasus 41 is a versatile and well-built shoe that excels in daily wear, training, running, and walking. From the first wear, the comfort and support are immediately noticeable. The cushioning provides a responsive feel, making each step smooth and effortless, whether you’re logging miles on a run or simply going about your day.  The materials feel durable and high-quality, built to withstand regular use without compromising comfort. The breathable upper ensures ventilation, keeping your feet cool during workouts. The outsole provides excellent traction, making it a reliable choice for various surfaces.  Overall, the Air Zoom Pegasus 41 delivers on both performance and longevity, making it a solid investment for anyone looking for a comfortable and durable all-around sneaker. Highly recommended for athletes and casual wearers alike!

Love these shoes. Love the Air Zoom Pegasus shoes so far. They are very comfortable, lightweight, and breathable. Great quality all around. I use these mostly for running and walking, but could be used for training or casual wear. Highly recommend!

Comfortable, reliable running shoe. Right out of the box, the Pegasus 41 felt comfortable and well cushioned. I do find the fit around the midfoot is on the snug side but there's enough room in the toe box to keep my toes happy. The padded tongue feels good when lacing up with no pressure points. The heel collar is just ok. It's a little tall for my liking. It's not completely uncomfortable but it is something I notice.  The design is clean and classic. The all-black colorway can be worn casually without looking like you just got done racing a 5k. The mesh upper is breathable, though I get the sense it'd be a little warm on hotter days (tbd as it's still winter). The ReactX foam provides a cushioned ride, but the forefoot feels a bit firmer than I'd prefer. I really like smooth heel-to-toe transition as I can't stand shoes that "rock" forward - even if they are more efficient.  Overall, it’s a solid daily trainer—comfortable, versatile, and reliable. Not the lightest or softest shoe out there, but if you want something that just works, this is a great pick

Great running shoes, not daily shoes. Initially I did not like the W Air Zoom Pegasus 41 shoes. But after a few wears my mind was completely changed! At first the shoes hugged the inside of my foot too tight. Not because the shoes were too small but the support on the back of the foot was too much. I thought they were uncomfortable. They seemed far too tight but only in the back. But after giving them a try on my treadmill, the support felt great! My foot felt stable, it didn’t feel like it was hugging too tight, and the breathable fabric was great. I also really liked the traction on the bottom of the shoe. The traction was fabulous. I gave these shoes a 4 because I didn’t love the all black design. The bottom of the shoe looks kind of cheap in my opinion. Almost like a doctor shoe. I also noticed that when I’m running, the shoes are great for support! But walking around as a daily wear, I notice the hug on the back of my foot again. Overall a great running shoe, maybe not a good daily wear!

Nike W Air Zoom Pegasus 41. Absolutely love this shoe! It’s my all day everyday wear shoe for almost all occasions. The black on black goes with just about everything and doesn’t show dirtiness near as much as other color schemes.  It feels very comfortable during all day wear, breathable material all around. The insert feels like a harder durometer gel that is forgiving and does a decent job forming to the feet.  I really like the rounded posterior heel, it won’t wear down so much on me. Love, love, love the thick and durable “eyelets” that hold the quality laces they come with! The heel cup is a little bit narrow for my feet, but has a nice slightly wider toebox

Great cushion, treadmill running. I have had these shoes for a few weeks and do mostly treadmill running as I live in a very snowy climate and have found these Nike’s were easy to break in on the treadmill. The quality seems too notch and on par with Nike shoes! One thing I noticed when I first slipped them on is the cushioned, comfy feel on the footbed, the top back of the heel and also the tongue of the shoes.  The tongue of the shoes and where the laces are have a really awesome flex in them! I noticed that right away and believe it adds to the comfort and support my feet feel while wearing these.   I have pretty narrow feet, which a good arch and am a size 8, these fit right on for my feet and size. I normally up in running shoes but have found that in Nikes are true to size each time I get them. They are true to size and fit really well!   In addition, running on the treadmill has felt just fine on these! They breathe easy and are supportive. I haven’t had any issues so far! I also wear them out for errands after the gym and they re comfortable and stylish as well.  They go great with leggings and a sweat shirt while running errands around town. It’s nice to have athletic shoes that I feel cute in, too!   Also, like the fabric and the design of these shoes but find that I’m not incredibly picky about those two points. But I think the all black looks really slick and I have gotten several compliments when I wear them! Which I find to be great feedback on the design.  As for the things I would change or like to see in a Nike running shoe is a zero drop and a wider toe box. I do understand that isn’t quite Nikes style but I do believe there is a market for the Nike runner like me who wants a bit better foot health in my shoe. I have mild bunions and do believe that a wider toe box is best for my feet.  Other than that, they feel fine on my feet with those issues I do recommend these and have enjoyed them!

W Air Zoom Pegasus 41. The W Air Zoom Pegasus 41 is a versatile and comfortable running shoe that delivers on both performance and style. The fit of the Pegasus 41 is spot on. It’s snug without being restrictive, offering a secure feel around the midfoot and a slight roominess in the toe box. The shoe is lightweight, which makes it perfect for long runs or daily wear. The design of the Pegasus 41 is sleek and modern, featuring smooth lines and a streamlined silhouette. I have black but it’s available in a variety of colors, so there’s something for everyone. The fabric used is high-quality and breathable, offering a balance of durability and ventilation. The midsole foam feels resilient but cushioned enough to absorb the shock from running on hard surfaces. What stood out to me most about the Pegasus 41 is its exceptional comfort. I can definitely wear these on long or short runs while being comfortable. If I had to change anything, the shoe could use a bit more variety in the upper material for even better breathability in extremely hot weather. I live in Florida were summers are brutally hot, so the more breathable the shoe, the better for me. Overall the W Air Zoom Pegasus 41 is a top-tier running shoe that offers impressive comfort, support, and style. It’s versatile enough for a variety of activities and performance levels, making it a great choice for anyone who enjoys a dependable and stylish running shoe

Perfect indoors and outdoors. I own a pair of Nike Pegasus shoes, as does my husband, and they are hands down our go to line for running/trail/exercise shoes. The look of these shoes is really sleek. We got the all black versions of these shoes originally for me, but they quickly were taken by my daughter, who has proudly determined these are "the coolest shoes for the gym". She has used them on the treadmill, while using the weight machines, and while walking the track. Additionally, we've tested them out on the great outdoors. These shoes seem to handle everything with ease. She is a big complainer (I love her so much, but feel it's a traditional part of teenager-hood), but with these shoes I've not heard a single complaint. She loves the look and the feel. I have asked about support and it seems like both her foot and ankle are well supported in these shoes. The grip on the bottom seems great too- she hasn't had a single instance (even when it's wet and snowy outside) where she has slid or lost her balance at all.   They also seem quite durable. She's pretty hard on shoes but these aren't showing any wear at all, on the sole or the fabric, after over 2 weeks of consistent use. There isn't even a single scuff! The shoe laces are also great. Her last pair of running shoes had these ribbon like laces that didn't stayed tied very well so we frequently had to retie them. With these Pegasus 41s, one tie lasts until she changes shoes.   If I were to change one thing, I'd make them just slightly more padded so they had a little more bounce to them. However, she seems happy with them and they seem to do exactly what is needed.   I will certainly be looking to get a pair for myself (again). 10/10 I recommend these shoes to everyone who needs them for indoor exercise, or outdoor

Comfort and Performance. If you are looking for a running shoe that combines comfort with versatility and performance, then the W Air Zoom Pegasus 41 is for you!  The W Air Zoom is a light-weight shoe with excellent cushioning that is evenly distributed providing maximum comfort.  Whether running, walking, weight training or everyday use, the cushioning provides a cloud like experience for your feet.  The zoom air technology provides cushioning in all the right places and gives you that added push when starting out and also allows for a softer landing lessening the overall impact with the ground making it the best feature of this sneaker.  The front part of the shoe is made from a breathable mesh fabric which provides for excellent ventilation both during and after a workout while creating a snug fit that allows your foot to feel both supported and secure without being restricted.  The rubber sole provides good grip and traction on the ground and held firm in all types of weather and conditions.  The shoe has a nice, simple, sleek design making it extremely versatile.  Whether going to the gym or out and about for the day, the sneaker provides a sharp, classic appearance, particularly in all black.  This sneaker was great from the start and was comfortable, agile and supportive.  It did not require a break in period of time in order to find your groove.  All you have to do is lace up and start moving.  A great workout awaits

Overall comfortable. I work in a physically demanding job position  that includes lifting, carrying, and doing a lot of walking on a daily basis, making comfortable, supportive shoes a must. Overall, the W Air Zoom Pegasus 41 are comfortable upon initially putting them on and fit well in my normal size. I prefer a somewhat wider toe box and these felt good in that area. After 4-5 hours at work, the arch of one of my feet inevitably ends up consistently lightly sore in these. It's not so uncomfortable that I won't continue to wear them, but they don't quite meet the comfort level of my other newer "running" shoe purchase. The shoe is fairly lightweight and the fabric is breathable, which I like. The sole material feels bouncy, but sturdy. The bottom has a good amount of grip on smooth tile flooring.  Some minor changes I would make to these shoes are: The tongue is puffy and doesn't quite meet the side of the shoe near the top lacing holes on the inside of the feet. It's not overtly noticeable, but isn't an issue I've ever had with any other shoe, so I don't think it's just my foot shape. The sides of the shoes are lower than other running shoes own, while it doesn't cause a problem with fit, more of my socks show than I'd prefer.  After a week of wear on concrete and tile floors, I would say these have held up as mostly comfortable and I expect they will "break-in" with a few more days of wear

Lightweight and breathable!. These shoes are extremely lightweight and breathable which is super awesome! I also really loved the heel and ankle support they provided. My feet typically get really hot and sweaty in running shoes/tennis shoes however I did not have that problem at all with these! Super basic aesthetic design which I loved as it made it easier to wear them with anything and everything.   The only con I noticed while wearing them is to be cautious if you have a wider foot. I have a wider foot and higher arches and while they felt fantastic immediately and for a bit after, I  noticed that my feet started hurting on the outsides after a few hours of wearing them. They were great for shorter walks/trips but not great for longer term wear.   The lightness of the shoes was absolutely fantastic though!

The fabric: The material is breathable, I didn’t feel like my feet ever got hot or uncomfortable after runs. It also feels like it will keep its shape for a long time. The Design: so, at first I was a little worried about how bulky the sole looked right out of the box. I haven’t tried the bulky trend, and didn’t really want to try it now. The shape of the sole is also nice, the way it is formed it almost propels you forward. I also appreciate the reflective parts for evening runs. The fit: I found the fit true to size.   Cons: I haven’t ran into any yet, just it would be great to have more color options please! I’m going to need to get a second pair

Achieve your running goals, big or small. If any running shoe could be described as unpredictably perfect, for me, it would be the Air Zoom Pegasus runner. Each one of Nike's updates improves upon something that was assumably, already perfect. I'm amazed at the intricate and insightful tinkering Nike performs, year-after-year, to keep road warriors coming back for more.  Once again, Nike has given us another awesome iteration with the Pegasus 41 and it's an overall solid update. Visually, the 41s are almost indistinguishable from previous years, which is fine, but the shoe feels like we could finally be getting back to the glory days of 30s era Pegasus runners.  The 41s fit, feel and energy return all are greatly improved from recent years and very much what I loved about earlier model Pegasus runners. These were cushy, but not too much, very responsive and great for long distance and/or intense training. I'm please to find Nike moving back to a more balanced style of runner that is still up to the task, thanks to new technology.  I've been using this as a daily long-ish distance runner (2k-5k) and it's been a very pleasant surprise breaking these in and pushing them further. I don't know much about the new ReactX foam, but I think it might be the new special sauce. It could be cushier, but it's not bad. There's also some noticeable padding around the tongue and heel area that helps lock in your foot in nicely without have to ratchet down the laces for every run.  My only real complaint with the Pegasus 41 is that the shoe just feels a little tall and a bit heavy. I always eventually acclimate, but I notice it every time I start my runs.  I really do like this shoe so far, but it's definitely not perfect. Still, I would till highly recommended the Air Zoom Pegasus 41 for anything you're setting out to do on the road, track or treadmill. If you're a seasoned vet who knows the Pegasus runners well, I can say this year's model is absolutely a STEP in the right direction... sorry

Fantastic Running Shoes. Let me just say these are a fantastic running shoe that not only can be used for training, but also casually because of utterly comfortable it is. First, the design of the shoe is clean and nice. I like how it doesn't have the typical eyelets of holes that the laces go through that other shoes have but rather it has a more cylinder-like approach, which makes it easier to tighten or even replace the laces. The upper material is also knit-like and has unbelievable breathability. It fits perfectly over your feet but it also super comfortable as it feels like it molds over them. Also, the outsole is huge, which is the other part of why these are so comfortable to wear. While training or casually walking, the outsole makes the shoe feel like you are walking on clouds but is also stable enough for your ankle and feet that it makes running, or any activity of that matter, nice and enjoyable. The ankle area also feels more cushioned and padded than normal, which is also a big plus. Fit-wise, I would recommend to go true to size. As for the break-in period, I found, in my experience, that there is no need to break them in as they feel great right out the box. Durability-wise, I feel like it held up pretty well and after many reps, I can already tell that they will last pretty long. Overall, I would say these are one of the best and most comfortable pair of shoes that I own. It works for anything, whether running, walking, training, or just to wear casually

Top Notch Running Shoe. This is a fantastic shoe for runners seeking a balance between comfort, responsiveness, and durability. Right off the bat, the shoe feels well-rounded—not too minimal nor overly cushioned. The upper is crafted with a breathable mesh that provides a snug fit without feeling restrictive, and it flexes naturally with each step. The mid-foot feels secure, offering a nice balance of lockdown and room for toe splay, which is great for longer runs.  The Zoom Air technology in the forefoot is responsive, giving you that quick, propulsive feel on push-off, while still offering enough cushioning to soften the impact when landing. The heel area has more substantial padding, which is perfect if you’re a heel striker, but doesn’t feel too bulky. It's a well-thought-out design that adapts well to different running styles.  Where this shoe really excels is its versatility—whether you're doing a daily jog, a long run, or just walking around, it never feels out of place. It's a reliable everyday trainer that can handle the miles without breaking down. If you are looking for a smooth, cushioned ride with a touch of speed, this shoe offers a compelling blend of comfort, performance, and longevity

Air Zoom Pegasus 41 offers extreme comfort!. From the first time I put on the Air Zoom Pegasus 41, it was clear that it would become my go-to running shoe. The sneaker offers extreme comfort, whether you're pounding the pavement or standing for long hours. The breathable mesh upper keeps your feet cool during intense workouts and the rubber sole offers good traction for those looking for a sneaker for outdoor running. The appearance of the sneaker is understated but the comfort of the sneaker can't be stated enough. The Air Zoom Pegasus 41 is also incredibly lightweight, to ensure that you keep running your fastest

Classic reliable shoe. I’ve had two prior models of this shoe be my primary running shoe and this one is by far the springiest! Right out of the box they felt great under my feet.   The midsole is soft but not too soft where it takes an extra effort to push back off. Zoom Air is my favorite cushioning but adding in the new ReactX cushioning was a game changer.   The upper has a simple but breathable and seemingly durable design. Ankle cut and tongue has been comfortable and I haven’t had any issues with ankle chafing or blisters  I feel aesthetically the design of the shoe builds off of the heritage of prior models but stays fresh where it doesn’t just feel like you’re buying the same model in a different year but lets it be its own shoe.   Fit feels secure with little to no forefoot or heel slippage.   From a colorway perspective the all black obviously isn’t flashy but is versatile in that it can be used in an exercise or casual environment but also a great option for work spent primarily on your feet and with a strict dress code (refereeing, certain service jobs, etc.)  The main thing I would change is not a design deficiency but more of a personal preference based on my running gait. The shoe definitely has a higher heel to toe height ratio than in some of my other shoes. I have a tendency to sometimes run more with my toes especially with sprinting so it was an adjustment running more heel to toe. Ultimately it was by no means insurmountable (if anything it probably made my running form more “proper”) and still a very comfortable shoe

The best feature compared to past Pegasus models is the shorter tongue; this makes the shoes much more sleek and aesthetically pleasing. One thing to keep in mind is that it runs slightly smaller than past models. Overall this is my new favorite because it’s the perfect balance of cushion without being too overbuilt and bulky

Great everyday trainer from a classic model!. I’ve been running for most of my life and have ran in many different Pegasus models. Most recently, I went through four pairs of the 40 in my marathon training last year and this year. I really like the 41 though. I like that the Nike symbol is a little smaller and filled in solidly this time around. The overall look reminds of some of the 90s air maxes (without the airbag of course). The ride is smooth and the fit is what I expect. At this point, the Pegasus is a fastball down the middle. I generally know what I’m getting. It doesn’t offer some of the high end features of the Invincible, but this a great everyday neutral cushion trainer that you can really stack miles on. I’d argue you can get more mileage out of these than Althea Invincible, so if just depends what you prefer. After not loving the look for a bit, the 41 is great and a breath of fresh air, which makes me happy. Going from the Pegasus in training runs to the Valorfly’s on race day has been a great combination for me and I look forward to many more runs in the Pegasus 41!

So if you need a new pair of running shoes or just a pair to walk around the Air Zoom Pegasus 41 is the shoe to get! They’re definitely true to size so if you have wide feet I’d highly recommend to get the wide feet option

Great daily trainer. [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Great for walking all day! I wear these at least once a week for a 12 hour shift and they are comfortable and cushy! I’m not a runner so I can’t comment on that aspect, but as a trauma nurse, I like these a lot!

Great daily trainer. [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Great for walking all day! I wear these at least once a week for a 12 hour shift and they are comfortable and cushy! I’m not a runner so I can’t comment on that aspect, but as a trauma nurse, I like these a lot!
Pegasus 41 Review. [This review was collected as part of a promotion.] Great cushioning to support my daily 2-3 mile run!

Zooming with the shoes. The name for the shoes are what I would describe how they feel. I feel lighter and faster running on the track, treadmill and even on a trail with these shoes. The fit is amazing and the comfort is INSANE ! My husband is the biggest critic with running shoes and that was his review on them. The color and materials used for these shoes were definitely thought out and have no complains just compliments

A+ for comfort. WOW! The comfort on this shoe is amazingly beautiful! It literally feels like you’re walking on clouds. The way it hugs your foot makes it super comfortable for running and the lightness of the shoe feels like you’re not wearing anything. The material is super breathable and doesn’t make your foot sweaty. The color way is so bright and colorful that it makes me happy to go on a run or even just use them as my everyday shoe ! One downside as a wide foot person it fits so nice but if you have a wide and chubby foot might want to go up half a size for a less tight fit

Cushiest sneaker!. - Plush Comfort: These shoes are incredibly cushioned and provide a comfortable ride throughout. The toe box is roomy enough to avoid pinching, but still supportive for a secure fit. This is a big win for me as I often experience pinky toe issues with both walking and running!  - Ankle Support: If you have sensitive ankles, you might want to consider socks with extra padding or a higher cut, as these shoes have a higher ankle pitch in the back.   - Versatility: I've used these shoes for both walking and running, and they've done well in both activities - was able to jump right in with little to no break in period (which is rare!)

Sooo comfortable!. I love these shoes and this color way! I was a little apprehensive at first because it looked narrow and I have wide feet but the shoes fit me so well! They are not as soft as the invincible shoes but they are still really comfortable and I’ve been wearing the during my running sessions and work out sessions at the gym even when I use the stair master. I recommend these 100% they exceeded my expectations!

New Pegs, New Wings. Wow! Just wow. What a difference the new Nike reactX foam in the design of the Peg 41s does. These pony’s slide ride on giving you that contoured glove-like feeling. Took these horses out for a run right out of the box and had zero issues with stiffness and breaking them in. Went 7 miles with no bugaboos or pain points. Super easy and fun to run in. From road to dirt trails, it was all just fun in the sun. New plush and cushioned tongue feels amazing. I’ve walked over 26 miles in just the week or two of having them. Love the color schemes. Fabric breathes nice allowing for natural air flow. The whole shoe just feels different from iterations before. Dare I say it’s the best Pegasus? Yes.. absolutely yes! Get em!  Just an overall great and good looking shoe

Amazing comfort. These are one of the most comfortable Pegasus models Nike has made, a complete home run for everything from walking to casual runs to long miles logged. Highly recommend the 41’s, you won’t be disappointed
Amazing shoes!!. The Nike Air Zoom Pegasus 41 shoes are the most comfortable shoes I’ve ever worn while running! They also look and feel great and can be worn as everyday shoes!

Pegasus. The shoes are very comfortable for everyday use or for gym, indoor/outdoor running. It can be used on trail as it has enough traction on the bottom, also it can be used for road racing and distance running as I was able to run 3 miles in these without any issues. Very lightweight and soft in the inside, with the Nike react foam creating a light bouncy movement in the heel for a more comfortable feel, an all around great running shoe

Cushy walking shoes. The first thing I noticed about these shoes is the cushioning. The sole is plush and comfortable… this is thanks to the ReactX foam! Despite all the cushioning, they are still decently lightweight which is great. I plan to use them for walking and daily short runs. Another big plus is the mesh upper makes them very breathable! The only potential concerns are they are a little narrow, and there isn’t too much arch support. I will say the toe box is a bit wider which helps, and the arch issue could be corrected easily with insoles. Overall, a great everyday shoe. Good for short to midrange runs on a treadmill or outdoor pavement!

Best Running shoes ever !. These shoes are the best ! So comfortable , I’ve been running in them for a couple weeks now and they have not disappointed ! They run true to size and the color way I got pops out so much , I’ve received multiple compliments and I def recommend this shoe to anyone who wants to start running. Fabric is also breathable which is always a plus !
Volt runners!!!. Hands down the best shoes I’ve ever worn for standing, walking, running, etc.  Nonstop commitments about the volt color that I love.  Waiting on the all black pair to drop

Pegasus Pleasure. These are the most comfortable pair of running shoes I’ve ever owned. The extra cushion support made it feel as if I was walking on a cloud and when running, I felt like it gave me an extra pep in my step that helped me tap into a level of speed that I didn’t know I still had. I can’t say enough great things about this amazing shoe. It fits true to size, is lightweight, made of a breathable material and I can’t help but say this again… SO COMFY! The only thing I wish was different is the color I got mine in because the white is already getting dirty thanks to all the good use I’m getting out of them

Love this Shoe!. Love the color selection!  I am able to wear athletic shoes to work and was happy to find another style from Nike that was comfortable.   I can have a hard time finding a shoe to fit properly. I have a wide forefoot and narrower heel area, but, the wide sizes are a little too wide and may slip off my heel. This shoe, in the regular width, has a roomy toe box area and it was comfortable enough to wear all day (including a lunch time walk!).  Many people at work complimented the shoe and asked for the style name. I was happy to share how comfortable they were. It has good arch support and the sole is not too bulky, but provides a good cushion. The material was breathable and didn't make my feet hot.  The fit was perfect and since they have a great color selection, I'm definitely going to order more

The Best. I received these as a gift and upon opening the box I gasped. I have been looking for new running shoes and I love these. The vibrant colors (I got the pink and green ones) really blend well together and the shoe feels amazing. It’s great for long walks, jogging, and running. Great shoe!

Quality is suspect. Quality is suspect with these. The swoosh on the left foot started separating from the shoe after only wearing them twice. They’re extremely comfortable but there is no excuse for the swoosh coming off that quickly. I’m highly disappointed
Prod. Nike shoes are best...nice shoes..quality is good..color is also good

Very comfortable. More colors?!. Dang it! There’s only one good color way and the Volt keeps selling out before I get there! Anxiously awaiting additional color options. Shoe feels great on the foot. Wish it were  lighter though

Pegasus gave me wings. The Pegasus 41 are excellent shoes to run and put some miles in! The cushioning is nice and thick for longer runs but doesn’t feel too spongey giving you a nice bounce to your step. The curve of the sole gives your steps a nice push forward. The upper material is light and breathable. I also think Nike improved on the visual aesthetics of these compared to last years model.   Overall great improvements on an already fantastic shoe, I am looking forward to getting more runs in these!
King Pegasus! Love these.. I love these as my everyday running shoe. Superb comfort, stylish and enough speed.and support to get me through my standard runs. A winning shoe, love it
Best the vlot. Best shoe for every day run got the vlot color and very comfortable
Best Pegs ever!. Excellent comfort 👌 , very light, but excellent for running

PT like a pro!. The Nike Pegasus 41 shoes are a game-changer! I've been using them for mid-range runs on the street, and they also feel fantastic on the track. I even tackled an 8-mile paved hike, and my feet felt great throughout. These shoes are incredibly lightweight and breathe exceptionally well. The new Air Zoom units paired with the React X foam midsole provide outstanding comfort, leaving me with no aches or pains. Plus, the white color matches any outfit, and the glacier blue in the midsole adds an eye-catching pop. As an Air Force member, PT is a must and these wil be a regular rotation to my daily outfits.  Highly recommend these shoes for runners and fitness enthusiasts alike!

My new ‘go-to’ walking/running shoes!. I’m reaching for these shoes when I go to the gym, for walks and for amusement park days where I get at least 20K steps in. They fit true-to-size and I recommend to order the same size as other Nike running shoes you own. There is a lot of cushion support with the ReactX cushion, and you will feel more height. If you don’t like too high of a heel, you might feel extra height in these. However, since I have been dealing with an achy heel the last couple of weeks, the extra cushion relieved the aching for me during my workout! Putting them on is also not as challenging as other shoes I have — there is the right amount of allowance on the shoe tongue without sacrificing a ‘sock’ fit and feel when wearing them.   I got the Regular fit, with white/crimson/chrome/glacier blue color-way. I normally wear neutral colors (Black, White, Gray) so this color-way gives the perfect pop of color, while still having a neutral base. It elevates my gym outfits especially when wearing all black. Also the reflective material and swoosh is such a nice touch that is also functional if running in the evening. The shoes look better in person than online. Online the shoe looks like it has a thicker/bulkier sole, but it looks comparable in thickness to previous Pegasus models, which I prefer. Since they are running shoes, they do look very athletic, so I will probably reserve these for when wearing activewear versus jeans or slacks.  Overall, the fabric and the make of the shoe feels high-quality. It is very breathable, and the mesh fabric gives it a nice look especially since it layers the colors of the shoe (at least my color-way). The fabric makes it look really special! The additional pop of color on the laces is a nice way to tie it together too.   It is a reliable shoe, having had a previous version of Pegasus running shoes before; however, the technology and sustainability is elevated, and I truly feel the support in these shoes over others. Will definitely be reaching for these going forward!

Wings in a shoe. The Air Zoom Pegasus 41 is an everyday trainer shoe that can be used during cardio and strength training, it is very versatile shoe. What I love about the Air Zoom Pegasus 41 is its soft padded tongue and how comfortable it hugs your ankle. One of my favorite features is that it is engineered to reduce carbon footprint. I love how breathable the shoe feels and the comfort of the padded inside the shoe makes it great for running short and long distances

Cloud9. I absolutely love the sleek style of the shoe and cool tone colors. These can be work for everyday use and also comfortable for short distance runs. Fabric is very breathable.  I feel like I’m walking on clouds
So comfortable. Best running and walking shoes, so comfortable!

Best Pegasus to date. I’ve been wearing Pegasus’s for running as long as I can remember - mostly the trail ones but have several pairs of each.   Very impressed with this one, beyond comfortable for running on roads, tracks or a treadmill for daily activity - good mix of support and comfort/cushioning.  I have slightly wider feet and they allow foot/toe base room to move - these are true to size in fit.   Weight of the shoe is good, not overly heavy for the level of comfort, and I love the Dusty cactus/glacier blue color combo

Outer Overpronation solved!. This show is light, and confirms to Your foot. This is the first shoe I have bought from Nike that has not giving over pronation issues! I can walk and run without pain and its comfy cushion helps you walk balanced. Recommend for anyone with overpronation issues
Pegasus in the right direction. Excellent cushioning and love the room in toe box this is coming from a guy who has tried every brand under then sun

SUPER COMFORTABLE, BOUNCY AND STYLISH!. I bought these in neon yellow and absolutely love them! They are my first pair of 'proper' running trainers and I have found them extremely comfortable (I run once a week and train at the gym twice a week). Great bounce, very breathable and super stylish too (love all the details, like the swoosh at the ends of the laces!) I am a size 2.5 and they fit true to size. Very happy!
Excellent. Excellent looking and comfortable!! I’m addicted to Nike, but these are probably my favorite pair so far
Shows are great, just as pictures
Pegasus trainers are so dependable. Very comfortable and nicely padded for road running. Very pleased

Very comfortable. I was a little skeptical at first because I’m used to running shoes with a lot of cushion but I’m glad I purchased these. Tried them on and ran 2.5 miles with no pain, they are very comfortable. I purchased my regular size and the bright neon color is perfect. Highly recommend!

On cloud 9. The energy recovery was unmatched, as soon I put them on I knew I’d have a positive running experience to break them in I took a 3 mile run the strain was minimal. I was able to wear them out for 16hrs through, day to day activities, and work without any pain or discomfort
Lovely!. I have run 15 miles in these already…didn’t have to break them in at all. They almost feel like Nike Free. Will buy a second pair

Nike Air Zoom Pegasus 41. The Pegasus Zoom 41 upper is very much cushioned around the lower leg, ankle, and tongue, giving a secure, safe, no slippage and very comfortable fit. It runs true to size, and the arch support didn’t disappoint. Additionally, ths shoe has two Air Zoom units in the forefoot and rearfoot, which improve bounce, reaction, and responsiveness. I admired for its solid and secure feel during runs and for everyday walking making it fit for a variety and different surfaces, such as gravel paths, trail,  indoor, and roads. The outsole rubber is long-lasting and covers almost the entire bottom, ensuring long-term traction. The white color is perfect for summer. I’m impressed and  obsessed. I recommend this shoe to everyone

Light, Fresh & Comfy. Design of these is super clean. Keeping the overall upper minimal, but using different knit and color blocking to add style. Fit is spot on, for how slim they look they are a tiny bit roomy in the toe. Cushioning seemed a little bouncy at first, but broke in after putting a few miles on them. Sole has great tread for all terrains and great stability. Overall favorite part is the light and roomy feel, the only thing I would change is to be less bouncy in the cushioning
Clouds on my Feet. I keep gravitating to buying Pegasus running shoes! The new design and comfort is just great and comfy on my feet!

Great, Comfy, Breathable fabric; wonderful arc support. I used this shoe on an almost daily basis for the last couple of weeks. First, it felt a bit weird, but as I used them more - they turned out to be super comfy! I love the arc support and the way the fabric breath, making sure my feet’s stay dry even after long runs (5miles+). I was a bit afraid of its brighter colors, but surprisingly they clean really quickly without any marks left. Fabulous shoe indeed!!

W Air Zoom Pegasus 41. The shoe is definitely true to size. As a collegiate runner many times we are recommended to go a have size up in out running shoes, however for someone likes something to be true to size I was very pleased with the fit of the shoe. The material is very breathable and I did not see any issue with. While on a run it definitely feels like a shoe that can be used for people that are beginning to get into running and want to invest a little more, I can definitely see them as everyday trainers. As a runner I do not like to break in my shoes, however these are some that maybe needs two or three runs to get broken into, but from the first run you can feel the air pockets in the shoe and helps role off of your toes. I was happily surprised by that feeling of being to explode off of your toes a little more, I enjoyed that the most from my run. Overall the feel of the shoe was not bad at all and compared to other pegasus versions this one has to be my favorite and you can feel the bounce with every step. I really enjoy the designed although I do feel like it is moving toward the same look as the infinities and invincibles simply because of the sole of the shoe.   I do not think I would change anything about the shoe as of right now, simply because I feel like the air zoom units in the front and back make it an upgrade from previous versions

For the professional on their feet all day! + running 😇. As a physical therapist, I am on my feet all day and I could not find a better shoe to accomplish my day-to-day tasks and my workout at the end of the day in FULL COMFORT.  Definitely provides a plush, but responsive feel with support feedback via lace system and free cushioned tongue. The zoom reactx foam and zoom units at forefoot are a big upgrade on the 41, and overall my favorite silhouette yet! Great gift idea w/ Father’s Day this weekend, my Pops and uncle definitely getting a pair from me!

Cushy and cute summer sneaker. I absolutely LOVE this sneaker! The vibrant colorway is the perfect pop of fun to my summer outfits (and makes me look tanner than I am!). The real star, though, is the incredibly cushioned sole - it delivers a comfy bounce with every step while still keeping me feeling grounded.  The day I got them, I put them to the test on a one-mile walk. It was a long hot day and my feet were tired and swollen, so I was worried about needing a break-in period. To my surprise, these shoes were comfortable right out of the box – a rare find!! The toe box strikes the perfect balance - wide enough to avoid any pinching, yet snug enough to provide the support I need for walking and running. I seriously can't recommend them enough!

Good fit, lively ride. Been on 2x 10k runs with these now. Previous pair were Pegasus 38s. First impressions are that this is a more stable shoe that feels lighter on the foot and more responsive. Seamless upper is similar in fit with more airflow and an improved heel tab that makes them easier to put on. This is not a super-cushioned trainer, more of a balance between speed and comfort. Generally I don't like the instability of a super-soft sole. The Pegasus 41 suits me just fine so far

I love the Pegasus 41!!. The Pegasus 41 running shoe has soft mesh and padding which made it super comfortable. Whether I’m on the treadmill or walking at the park, the ReactX has a nice balance of bounce and support. I love the design and appreciate the soft materials. In my opinion, it’s true-to-size. I went with my regular size which is size 8 womens. What I love most is the comfortability and I wouldn’t change a thing. I’m hoping Nike releases more colors soon!

Pegasus 41 SOTY. These shoes are very comfortable for an everyday use. Not to mention they are wonderful for running. The strong ankle support has no slippage, the toe box has a very airy mesh and the sole I very comfortable and has the perfect rebound and squishiness. The revamp from last years version makes this the perfect shoe for looks and feel. Highly recommend

Highly recommend Pegasus 41!!. I had been running in the Nike Pegasus 39 and then the Nike Pegasus zoom turbo next nature. My draft review will be in comparison to my past experience with these shoes.  The Nike Pegasus 41 when you first put it on feels amazing. Personally when I am running I like a tighter fit on the instep of my foot and the Nike Pegasus 41 offers the tightness I like to have in my running shoes. As soon as I walked around in the the pegs I was able to feel the Nike react X right off the bat. It is super lightweight for how it feels. After doing a couple of runs in them the cushion felt even better. As a heel striker I appreciate the cushion and support in the heel make my run feel more comfortable and the way the shoe is shaped gave me a nice heel to toe transition. The react x feels responsive along with great energy return. However, the air zoom unit in the forefoot I did have a bit trouble feeling. I’m not too focused on it because of my past experience with Nike pegasus or Nike shoes with air zoom unit. I tend to feel it after wearing it or breaking the shoe in.    The design is great not only does it look very nice and appealing, personally I feel like it has a nice rocker shape to it which allows for a smooth heel to toe transition. Aesthetically speaking it’s one of my favorite designs out of the pegasus line. The fabric feels great! Coming off the Nike Pegasus zoom turbo next nature, I love the feel of the materials. Personally I felt it more breathable and comfortable when running. The thing I like the most about the shoe is how the cushion feels and the look of the shoe. I think the cushion is truly amazing something that most runners will benefit from. Al through the cushion is great it does not come at the cost of weight. When running it feel light. The looks speak for themselves, it is a very clean shoe. One theming I would charge is I noticed that in the heel of the shoe, close to where the midsole and heel meet there is a dip inside the shoe right where the edge of your ankle sits. At first it feels uncomfortable and unstable. I did somewhat get used to it although I still feel that it is there. Not a major problem because when your running that problem kind of fades away when you find your stride, just something I did notice that I would change

The BEST shoe!. This was my first time ordering the Nike Pegasus and I am obsessed! The arch support in the shoe is amazing. I loved it so much that I bought my husband a pair. Your feet will never be happier!

Comfy & supportive. Currently training for a David Goggins 4x4x48, needed some new road running footwear. Have done a couple of 4 milers in them and have to say the Pegasus 41 delivers a comfortable ride, although a little bit spongy but i can live with that overall a fantastic trainer and i definitely recommend the  Peg 41

React x foam for the win!. I love the react x foam.  The cushioning is so good on these.  I’m a pretty avid runner.  The stack height on these combined with the react x foam at the rear foot make for great cushioning and shock absorption then transitioning to the zoom unit at the forefoot make for a crazy comfy ride.  Always been a big fan of Nike mesh for breathability and fit.   If you need a comfy everyday runner it’s hard to go wrong with the new Pegasus

The Everyday Go-To. The Air Zoom Pegasus 41 is a near perfect everyday shoe.. from the 5am 5k.. to getting after it at the gym.. to those Tom Bradley International cross-terminal hustles to catch your flight.. to slow walks around the block while Mom talks your ear off.  These make everything effortlessly enjoyable.  They take the work out of footwork and put the fun back in cardio (card-fun-io??) all while holding up like a dump truck.  Lightweight. Supportive. Sticky-tack Traction. Eye-catching Colorways. So comfortable you’ll forget to take them off. Not to mention, hands down the best laces I’ve ever bunny-eared. The only problem I’ve found with these shoes is that I find myself looking for more reasons to walk/run/hit the road feet first

Air Zoom Pegasus = all around choice!. I’ve been a Nike Pegasus fan for years and this iteration doesn’t disappoint! The fit is great. I feel supported but not constricted. I love how lightweight they are. They are a great all-around shoe. I wear them to walk the dogs, do LISS and HIIT cardio and could even wear these to lift in the gym. The color way is so perfect for summer and give me an instant energy. These are an A+ purchase!

Great cushion, half size up for a wide instep. Got a pair for my wife, who is starting to run again after having our daughter. She’s normally a size 6.5; but we went half size up (7) due to her wide in-step and high arch. Fit was very comfortable. A narrower heel would fit her best (but that’s a personal preference). Lots of cushion for a slim profile shoe. Loved the color way and stays fairly clean

These are amazing. Omg I love love love these. I have had so many pegs over the years and they are so comfortable. I’m in love with the color volt and the fact that these are 95% covered in volt makes me so happy. They fit great and they are true to size!!

Great running shoes. I really like this shoe for running and everyday use. The foam feels great and they are comfortable. I would say they are true to size. Usually I size up because other Nike running shoes have been narrow but I don’t think you need to for these

All-New Pegasus 41. The all-new Pegasus 41 has so many new features that I am impressed with. The fit of this shoe makes it feel like you are walking on thin air while having the bounce from the responsive foam. The fabric used for the top of the shoe makes it feel comfortable and breathable. The shoes are not bulky at all. The colors on these shoes make them pop out and easily match anything. The shoe design makes it look completely different and unique in its own way. These shoes make it feel like you can do anything when you wear them. I recommend the Pegasus 41 because they are 10/10!!

W Air Zoom Pegasus 41. The W Air Zoom Pegasus 41 are really comfy. I wore them to my office job. My feet didn’t hurt all day even on my daily walks at work. I would recommend this product to anyone that wants a comfortable, light weight and sporty shoe. The only con I would say it has, would be the light color. Over time the color will get more dirty so definitely pick a darker shade. The shoes feels like you are walking on clouds and had extra support for those that need it. Especially if you are on your feet standing up all day. These shoes make standing all day tolerable and comfy. Overall get these shoes if you want to rock a comfy, breathable and nice design shoe

Best one yet. I buy the Pegasus every year. This one is by far the best. The shoe is incredibly comfortable to run in and springy. I hated the laces on the 40, but I love the laces on this one. I actually bought two pairs -- one for my indoor runs and one for my outdoor runs. Would definitely recommend especially for everyday runners

Air zoom Peg 41. I want to start off by saying I love the Nike pegasus line. Some of the most comfortable shoes I own(invincible 3 my fav). But the Nike air zoom pegasus 41 gives it a run for its money. I really enjoy the shoe. It has a modern look which I like and feel even better on foot, soft foam midsole but stable around the ankle. I like the design of this one over last year model. It is very breathable due to the top material.   Con I don’t have any problem with this, but if anything my next pair will be the all VOLT or black.   I think it’s save to say I found my new daily running pair

Great Shoes For The Everyday Runner. The Nike Air Zoom Pegasus 41 is a winner for the new generation of runners. Straight out of the box these are extremely comfortable with the new reactX midsole. These shoes feel bouncy and energetic with every step. As an average runner and trainer I appreciate the true to size fit and lovely dusty cactus colorway. The Air Zoom unit underneath is a highlight for me; propelling me forward with each stride and reducing fatigue. The knitted upper is soft and flexible while still providing the support needed for any activity. The details are on display with the reflective hits on the outside of the shoe as well as the Pegasus logo on the eyelet. My only con is the shoes are a little snug at first but when running this is a pro, because they feel secure on feet. Overall I can see these shoes helping me improve my running for years to come

Super Cushy and Narrow Toe Box. These have some of the softest and bounciest soles I've worn in a long time. They're great for walking and strolling. I'm not the highest intensity runner but these work well for an easy jog.  The laces and heel structure provide a great lockdown feel straight out of the box.  I do wish the toe box was wider; my toes feel a little compressed. The 10mm heel-toe drop could contribute to this as well. Also, although the colors are cool, the upper material traps dirt and is tough to keep looking fresh!  Finally, I appreciate Nike's efforts to roll out both less environmentally harmful and higher performance materials. It works well in this shoe
Very comfortable! Best running shoe I’ve bought!. Very comfortable shoe to run or walk in. Perfect for the gym or outside running/exercise. Also very stylish

Comfortable, Light, and Breathable running shoes. I recently tried the new Pegasus 41 and they have impressed me with their breathability and comfort. The shoes have a solid bottom that provides great stability, even for those with wide feet like mine. They are exceptionally comfortable for short runs on concrete or road surfaces. However, while the flexibility is great for shorter distances, it might not provide the necessary support one might need for longer runs. Overall, these shoes are a fantastic choice for shorter runs, casual wear, or for travel. One improvement I wish these had would be a loop on the back to help when putting them on

Most versatile runner for the money. The Nike Pegasus 41 is a jack of all trades. You would be hard pressed to find a more versatile runner on the market in this price range.  Nike hit it out of the park with the zoom and reactx midsole. With this blend of cushioning, I feel it is the most comfortable Pegasus to date. When running I can definitely feel a significant bounce in my step which allows me to run greater distances. The mesh upper is noticeably more comfortable and breathable than previous iterations, as you can actually feel the air flow through to your feet.  All in all the large improvements in styling, shape, and comfort of the Pegasus 41 make this shoe excellent for not only running/walking, but also a great shoe for everyday wear whether for the gym or running errands around town

Light & Bouncy !!. The new Pegasus 41’s are a home run! The look of them in my opinion is super sleek and stylish without over doing it. The fit is spot on. I have a wider fore foot so to me they feel just a bit snug but in a really good way. My feet feel supported but not constricted. The upper is very breathable and allows for good air circulation and the sole… the SOLE! I’m a huge React fan and the cushion in the ReactX foam midsole is super bouncy! I carry around more muscle than your avid runner at 6 feet tall and around 185lbs and the Pegasus 41’s made me feel like I was bouncing off the pavement when I wore them for my first run. 10/10 from me and couldn’t recommend enough!

The Perfect Walking Shoe!. I needed some new workout shoes and these came out right on time! They're incredibly comfy, like walking on clouds. The cushioning is just right, providing support without being too bulky. I love the bright neon colors that makes me stand out in the crowd. Whether I'm walking on the treadmill or running errands, these shoes keep my feet happy all day long. They are true to size but if you want a little more space in the toes I would go a half size up. Would 10/10 highly recommend!

Plush and Breathable Shoe That Fits. The Air Zoom Pegasus 41s are incredibly comfortable and lightweight. They fit true to size and require zero break in. I'm 6'2" 205 lbs with moderately flat feet. The Air Zoom and ReactX technologies create a soft and responsive ride that provides the support I need. They're even cushioned enough to wear at my standing desk for several hours per day. I like the overt Nike branding and the reflector details, but I would like to see more vibrant colorways in the future. The perforated mesh upper feels durable enough for treadmills and sidewalks, but I wouldn't take them hiking or run in wet conditions. My favorite thing about them is how gentle each heel strike feels. I also appreciate how these were made sustainably as part of Nike's Move To Zero journey. I love them. Thank you Nike for letting met test and review the Air Zoom Pegasus 41s!

A Pegasus that can fly at 41. I'm a person that loves new tech. I typically buy things that are cutting edge. Although it can mean some things aren't quite done yet. I am ecstatic to tell you these technologies were made for eachother. The react and the zoom make for an incredible full footed step. I would compare it to a barefoot step in fresh level grass, because you really feel the stability and movement from the shoe as if you know instinctively where you are. These shoes have excellent stability and reactivity with every step.   If you're a runner you will feel how comfortable the shoes are two miles into your run when your feet aren't sore and the react is helping you land each step. I feel confident enough to compete in them and my other competition shoes are nike vaporfly.   The vaporfly are great for marathons but aren't stylish enough for the streets. I'm happy the Pegasus 41 are available because they truly are. This is the first time I felt the Pegasus are truly the top shoe, For my whole workout. I can run, lift, and row wearing them. Hours in and I don't feel any fatigue. 30 miles in and I don't feel any wear.   The Pegasus are so breathable, my feet stay dry after an hour long run. I don't know how they managed to match such a comfortable sole to a breathable upper but man I'm happy they did. The Pegasus 41 are my new favroite shoe

True Love. I adore this iteration of the Pegasus! I was a Pegasus wearer for years, but abandoned them around 2018 to try “better” shoes. I returned to the Peg this year because I just could not find a daily trainer I loved, and I am so glad I gave the Pegasus another chance.   I was so excited about them out of the box on my easy 7 mile run that I chose them for my 20 miler over the weekend, and they delivered. Excellent cushioning while still feeling light and flexible underfoot. I ran on a mix of pavement, gravel, and dirt trail, and they had good traction and stability without having that over-built feeling so many shoes have now.   The upper is super comfy. I do have a narrow foot, so for me, the fit was perfect, but it is a narrower shoe with a sock-like fit. It runs true to size in terms of length.   If you like a super built up shoe with a ginormous amount of forefoot cushion, this may not be your jam. But if you love a shoe that allows your foot to move naturally without too much bulk underfoot, i would highly recommend. I have five other brands in my rotation right now, and this is easily my favorite trainer of the past couple years

Run and get a pair today!. These are my new go to running shoes! Its sometimes a struggle for me to find new running shoes because I have wide feet but these work just great. They are useful for everyday walks with my dog or for when I'm ready to go on my 3-5 mile run. If you are looking for new running shoes give these a try you will not be disappointed. The variety of colors they have are also a plus if youre trying to stand out or want an everyday look

New Go-To. I have been wearing Pegasus running shoes for almost 15 years and these are my favorite iteration to date. I look for a running shoe that I can run up to 6 miles in comfortably and that has enough stability to lift weights in after without having to change my shoes. These have the cushion of the Zoom Flys for running, but the stability of a Metcon for lifting - the perfect shoe for a workout class where you can't change shoes. Sometimes I size up in running shoes, but I did not need to with these and took my true size. They left enough room in the toe box to not feel like my toes were jamming after a long run. They run a little bit wider than previous Pegasus versions I have worn, but I actually liked having the extra room to accommodate a thicker sock. I have the light pink color and they are fun and feminine without being too flashy. These are my new go-to shoes for long runs, warm up runs, and to take to Barry's Bootcamp and Orangetheory classes. I highly recommend them!

All-around great running shoe. I’ve been wearing Pegasus models for several years and it’s always been a great staple running shoe. That said, the 41 is a clear upgrade from previous versions! The foam feels springier and overall these are SO comfortable. These are great for easy runs, long runs, tempo runs, even speed workouts. They feel more cushioned than past versions without feeling heavy at all.  I do wish the toe box had a bit more room (though IMO Nike shoes are notoriously narrow in the toe area), but I do feel like there is more space for my toes than past editions, which really adds to the comfort level of these.  The white/black/turquoise colorway is gorgeous and I know I’ll be wearing these both for running and more casual wear. The details in the design are really high quality and stylish.  I would say these are true to size and fit really well!
Favorite running shoe 2024!!!. Went from Pegasus 38 to the 41. This new volt colorway is where it’s at
Best Pegasus yet. Loved the 40 only to be completely outdone by the 41.

I found them more responsive than the Invincible 3 model which will always be my number one, but overall I love the Pegasus 41. True to size, stylish on foot

Pegasus' are back! 41 FTW. Finally a worthy Pegasus Model that brings back everything I love about the line-up. The last Pegasus I owned were the 32's and I didn't like any of the other numbers until now. 41s; out the box comfort. Minimal break-in. Soft upper mesh. Great balance of stability and comfort. The lacing keeps my ankle nice and snug and the tongue does not slip to the slide when running. Definitely worth the purchase!

So comfy!. I’m all about the comfort. I am no marathon runner, but I do run/walk a couple of miles every day and I’m so happy with my new Pegasus 41! This is the most comfortable pair I’ve ever had, and I’ve been a Pegasus fan for many years. The cushion is amazing -- it’s soft, it’s cozy, yet it keeps me steady and secure, and it kinda gives me a bit of an extra height too since I’m short haha. From the time I got them, I’ve used them for running on treadmill, and walking the streets of downtown Chicago on a recent trip! This will for sure be my every day go-to as well when I’m out and about

LOVE my Peg 41's!. I’ve run in every Pegasus model since the 29 and I have to say, this is the most excited I’ve been for a Peg release. I’ve logged about 70 miles in mine so far and they still feel like they are fresh out of the box. I’m more of a forefoot runner but even walking around in them after my runs, I still feel the same bounce as I do when running.  As for sizing, I’m a size 10 and while these have a more secure fit compared to previous models, my true size still fits very well. The tongue is sewn in almost like a sleeve which is nice to not worry about it moving from side to side or causing discomfort.  Nike did their thing with these, can’t wait to log more miles on my pair!

Comfort and Support - 10/10!. Love these Pegasus! They fit true to size even though I have a slightly wider foot, they are a little snug around the sides. Even with the snugness, they still feel super comfortable,  supportive, and bouncy! One of the thing I noticed was the back heel offers great support and lots of cushion. The back of my ankle is super sensitive and usually hurts from most shoes and the stiffness and these provided a lot of cushion and relief

My favorite Pegasus yet!. The Pegasus 41 is extremely comfortable. The shoe feels breathable and also has great traction. I have now ran on both wet and dry roads and was surprised by how much traction and foot support I received. The shoe runs true to size, I got my typical size. They are easy to slip on and are my new favorite running shoe. I definitely recommend this shoe

Cushioned & breathable!. I am currently training for a half marathon and used to wear the Nike Free Runs. I was in search of something with more cushion and breathability for my long training runs. I have always preferred thinner, flexible materials that form to my feet due to my skinny foot, so the Pegasus is definitely the most cushion I have ever ran with. These new Pegs have been exactly what I was looking for! The top of the shoe has tiny breathable holes that actually allow you to feel air pass through those little pockets, I've never experienced that with a running shoe. If you want a shoe that makes your feet feel protected, cushioned, and keeps you feeling fresh after 4-12 mile runs, this is the shoe for you!

Love the Pegasus 41!. A great shoe for beginners and more advanced runners. Runs true to size and love that you instantly feel the cushion in these new Pegasus! It took a few runs for the shoes to feel as great as they do, but are now feeling amazing on my feet. I had some smooth runs on a running treadmill and around the neighborhood. Also a great walking shoe. I like that it feels breathable for long runs too. Another plus for me is that they not only work functionally, but they also look great! These will be a go-to shoe for me for not only my runs this summer, but my errands too!

light as air, my new go-tos!. I was amazed with how lightweight and supportive these were- it felt like nothing was in the box!  The Pegasus has been my all-time favorite running shoe for a few years now, but I am loving how the ReactX foam in these feels on those longer walks/runs, no aches or pains!  I did notice that the mesh upper fit a bit snug, so I'd recommend sizing up a half size if you like having some room in the toe box. Also, can we talk about this colorway?!

Best Pegasus Yet!. The most comfortable Pegasus I’ve ran in! I was hesitant to grab a pair because I haven’t been a fan since the Pegasus 35, but figured I’d give them a try and they are the most comfy pair I’ve walked/ran in. The shoes are true to size & I was really impressed with the amount of cushion and stability I felt during my 2-3 mile runs. I definitely felt the cushion on the balls of my feet during my runs. Can’t wait to keep wearing them out this summer!

The Pegasus 41 is here to stay!. Just got my hands on the all-new Pegasus 41, and wow, I'm impressed! First off, the fabric used for the top of the shoe is incredibly soft and breathable, keeping my feet cool and comfy. The new foam is the perfect balance of plush and responsive – feels like walking on clouds but with the right amount of bounce.  The laces feel minimal and don't get in the way, which I love. Plus, the ankle and tongue areas are super soft, so no annoying rubbing or discomfort (especially if you wear no-show socks). They do fit true to size – I wear a Men’s 9 and it’s spot on, even with thicker socks.  I've been wearing them mainly for long walks, running errands, and just hanging out. They're stylish without being bulky, making them perfect for casual wear too. I’d highly recommend them to family and friends!
They are comfortable but they are a bit heavier than Pegasus 40. All in all I recommend them.

Like Bread and Butter!. For me, the Nike Pegasus 41 is a departure from the earlier models! The feel of the ReactX in the heel is incredible! Talk about soft and bouncy! When I first put them on, it was that plush and cloud-like feeling I instantly noticed! The next thing was the fit! The heel was a snug and comfortable fit, and as you work up to the toe box, things get a bit roomy! It is not too much, but it does allow me to stretch and spread my toes as I run without feeling confined. As someone who is just getting back into running, these things matter. And they matter to everyone. Departing from that, I would also say the feel of the run in them was great as well! I am typically a heel striker, but for reasons unknown when I ran, it felt comfortable to run on the balls of my feet more! Like the shoe was guiding/aiding me to run in a way that is most beneficial to me. The Zoom Air unit is also great, and responsive! My feet and legs felt fresh from beginning to end of my walks and runs! A con that I do have for these though, is that I do not feel that the toe box is as breathable as I would have liked. I often feel my toes getting warm and toasty. It was not a huge deal, but I may find annoyance in it for longer runs. Overall, it is a solid addition to the Pegasus lineage!

Finally the 41 is here <3. The best running shoes in the market. Best design and best durability. My 4th generation of Nike Pegasus running shoes. Also Nike has such a good customer service. I buy all my walking, running and tennis shoes from Nike. The only dissappointed I had was that I was expecting these shoes to be sold out already in April (like previous generations) but needed to wait longer. But this upgrade is great work from team Nike (I skipped the generation 40 as I think it was very dissappointing). But again, thank you for Nike team who has done excellent work with the Peg 41 💪💪💪

Uncomfortable and Disappointing. I recently purchased a pair of Nike shoes with high expectations, given the brand's reputation for quality athletic footwear. Unfortunately, my experience with these particular shoes has been extremely disappointing.  Firstly, the material used in the construction of these shoes feels cheap and uncomfortable. It lacks the flexibility and breathability that I usually associate with Nike products. The synthetic upper feels stiff and unforgiving, leading to discomfort during prolonged wear.  Moreover, the cushioning and support provided by the shoes are subpar. I expected a more comfortable and responsive feel, especially considering the premium price tag associated with the Nike brand. The insole seems inadequate, providing minimal shock absorption and leaving my feet fatigued after even short periods of use.  Durability is another significant concern. Despite the prominent Nike logo and branding, the overall build quality of these shoes does not live up to the standards I've come to expect. After just a few weeks of use, signs of wear and tear started to appear, making me question the longevity of the product.  Additionally, the design, while visually appealing, seems to prioritize aesthetics over functionality. The narrow fit and lack of proper arch support make these shoes unsuitable for those with wider feet or individuals seeking enhanced comfort for extended activities.  In conclusion, these Nike shoes have been a regrettable purchase. The uncomfortable material, lack of adequate support, and questionable durability make them a poor choice for anyone seeking a reliable and comfortable pair of athletic shoes. I would strongly advise potential buyers to consider alternative options within the same price range that offer better quality and performance

The best shoes in the world... EVER!. Got my first pair in 2015 & they're still going strong. I own 6 pairs now. I have a black pair I use for work - 12 hours healthcare shifts: bought those in 2017 and they too are still going after all the constant wear and use. These are so durable, extremely light so don’t fatigue your legs and, the best bit, they’re the most BREATHABLE shoes I’ve ever had! The durable mesh lets so much air in/out so your feet don’t overheat. This is brilliant on 12 hours shifts and fantastic if you’re doing lots of walking around. Have they got too dirty? No problem - just chuck them in the washing machine! And they’ll dry quickly afterwards too! These don’t have super squishy underfoot cushioning but as a result they offer excellent foot support - again perfect for tons of walking. I love shoes and these are the best footwear ever imho. The simple design also pairs well with almost ANY clothing. I hope they never stop making them and dread the day they go out of style

Great product!. Fit and Feel: The Nike Air Zoom Bella 7 fits comfortably with a secure midfoot panel and supportive heel, making it ideal for workouts. Design: The sleek design lines and sculpted elements make the shoe stylish for both gym and casual wear.  Fabric: The breathable mesh upper is lightweight and stretches well, enhancing comfort during movement.  What I liked Most: The combination of stability and cushioning is excellent for various exercises.  What I Would Change: Adding more cushioning in the forefoot for better comfort during high-impact activities would be beneficial

Comfortable shoe for my workouts!. This is a great workout shoe for lifting. The back heel is firm which provides a lot of support and stability in deadlifts. Great for cross training. The Nike Air Zoom Bella 7s are some great training shoes. However, I would recommend sizing up. I ordered my usual size, but they felt slightly snug, so going up half a size would have been more comfortable

Comfortable and great quality. These shoes are great! They're incredibly comfortable, offering the support I need for both cycling and strength training. The fit is snug but not too tight, providing a secure feel during workouts.  The design is sharp and sleek, giving the shoes a modern, stylish look. They look great whether I'm in the gym or out for a ride. However, the light color could easily stain, so I prefer wearing them on nice days or indoors to avoid that concern.  The fabric feels nice and high-quality, but as mentioned, the lighter color does seem to make them prone to staining. Unfortunately, they can't just be wiped off easily, so it’s something to keep in mind if you're planning to wear them outside in less-than-ideal conditions.  The comfort and agility. These shoes allow for quick, fluid movement while providing the cushioning needed for long training sessions. I’m really impressed with how they support me during different activities

A little tight on ankle but good when broken in. I like this shoe a lot the color was easy to match with most of my walking/running clothes and that was a selling point for me. I got compliments in these shoes while at the gym and that made my night overall, a good shoe just needs to be broken in a bit

Great trainers for just about anything!. First off, these trainers are so adorably flattering, neutral, fresh and cuuute!!   The fit is great for me and my narrow, small foot, and I love how light they are. Perfect to move swiftly and with great agility in a total body conditioning and dance fitness class. Some shoes will give me knee issues twisting and turning quickly on the floor, but these have been supportive and empowering for anything from these type of classes to a walk in the park with the littles!   The light and airy fabric texture is exactly what I need right now as the sun is coming out finally, and also feels leveled up from my previous mesh sneakers.   The fresh white color is everything this spring and is a go to addition to all my spring fits…and the fun 90s inspired air bubble with hints of baby blue is  chefs kiss.   I love these sneakers and will they will be a huge staple of my spring wardrobe

Bellisima. These shoes felt great, they were snug but secure, athough you may want to go half a size up if you have a wide foot.
