Classic with a twist. You can’t go wrong with AF1 all whites! Including the fly ease technology into the shoes adds a nice additional to a Nike classic. You don’t have to worry about the heal of the shoe as your foot slides right in. I honestly prefer the fly ease technology to the old design. Would definitely recommend!

All white. These Nikes can never go out of style. I love that I can wear these shoes with anything! It’s hard to keep them clean but overall the style and originality of this shoe is timeless! The only thing I don’t like is the clean factor but what white shoe can you keep spotless? These nikes are very comfortable and now that I know the secret of getting rid of the bumbs and creases, I’m sure I can keep them looking good for years to come. I can’t wait to see the other color ways that come out. Satisfied customer as always

Easy Comfort. Having worn many Nike dunks and Air Jordan 1’s, these AF1s fit true to size. There is noticeably a thicker sole which makes the shoes feel comfortable when walking or standing for long periods. The Flyease is a great feature for easily slipping on the shoe without untying laces. With that being said, the low cut ankle is a great design for the summer. The leather seems durable and long lasting. Best part about the shoe is the comfortable sole. It makes me taller. Personally, the worst part about the shoe is that they feel bulky and stiff when walking. If I were to change something about the shoe it would probably be the silver shoelace buckle to a white buckle

Dope classic. The fit and feel of the shoe. Definitely that same classic comfortable casual feel of air forces that you can wear them all day. Slips on real easy thanks to the flyease feature that might be my favorite part. Wouldn’t change anything about the shoe. Might need some more color ways, but you can’t go wrong with the all whites. Good for any occasion

Kid loves them!. Kid loves his white Air Force 1s so much he wanted another pair.  Saw these and asked if they would be ok being that he doesn’t ‘tie’ his shoes. He loves the black accents and how easy they are to slip on.  I count this as a mom win so I’ll take it!

Timeless Classic. First, I want to say that these are classic shoes that (in my opinion) will never go out of style. This shoe feels very comfortable and fits like a glove. From what I can tell the difference between the AF1 Flyease and the normal AF1 is that the Flyease has a little bit bigger sole making the shoe sit higher. Other than the sole, from what I can tell these shoes seem to match the design of the normal AF1s. I love the timeless style of these shoes and I love the look of a clean pair of white AF1s. I was able to wear this shoe all day long and plan on wearing it a lot more. Overall, I would say this is a solid shoe that is a timeless classic. These shoes are extremely versatile and you can match these shoes with anything. They are very comfortable and I wouldn't change anything about them
Classic made better. A classic made even better. I love everything Flyease and these do not disappoint. Ladies were sold out so purchased the mens in my size and they fit great

Nike Air Force 1 07’ Flyease. The Nike Air Force 1 07’ Flyease is a classic shoe that you cannot go wrong with- a timeless silhouette. It is well known that the Air Force does run slightly big or if you prefer your air forces not to crease as easily I would always recommend to go a half size down- so yes the shoe does run only slightly big. The feel of this specific air force model is a premium feel the leather quality is definitely there. The Air Force 1 07’ Flyease is very comfortable to wear all day but for extra comfort I would recommend to go with that half size down. That added support to the backtab of the shoe does not crease is genius. I would not change a thing about the Nike Air Force 1 07’ Flyease it is a timeless silhouette and the added durability to the backtab of the shoe is an exceptional touch; if I could say one thing that could be changed is make the shoe more true to size
Recommended. Very comfortable shoe

Classic AF1. These Air Force 1s are amazingly classic in pure white and remind me of the early 2000s! The look great and I’ve received so many compliments. They cleaned upped easy with soap and water after getting a little dirty. They are super high quality and have all the AF1 details you’d expect.    In general AF1s are heavier than your average tennis shoe and it may take some time to get used to having the shallower arch. Totally recommend these shoes!!

Air Force 1 07' Flyease. I'm a big sneakerhead and adding these forces to my collection was a must. They are great to wear just going to the store or throwing them on to step out for the night. They fit true to size and are extremely comfortable so you can stand in them all day with no problem

Fresh update on Iconic Design. These shoes are a wardrobe staple for me. They are versatile and can be paired with a lot of different fits- both dressed up or dressed down. The white on white leather looks sharp. The bottom of the shoe has an almost platform look which really elevates the style, while maintaining that 80s/90s classic skater cool vibe.  They are comfortable enough for long wear, the base of the shoe absorbed a lot of impact, but it does make the overall weight of the shoe heavier. I have a wide foot and I found shoe to be true to size but a snug fit. The stiffness of the leather will take some time to comfortably break in, but I just think that adds to the durability of the shoe. It’s clearly well made.  Overall, I’m very impressed by this shoe

Air Force Ones - Timeless style!. This is my first pair of Air Force 1’s. I have always seen them but have never went out and got a pair until now. I’m so happy I did! I used to think they were just fashionable shoes with no durability or comfort but now that I have my own pair I can see AF1’s have it all! Super comfortable, and probably the most durable pair of stylish shoes that i’ve ever had! Those icy white shoes always stand out! I loved them so much I had to buy my Boyfriend a pair! They are absolutely timeless. They have been a big part of pop culture for a long time, and they will continue to be!

Stylish and comfortable. The Air Force 1 07’ Flyease is a stylish and comfortable shoe. The fit of the shoe is true to its size and it’s comfortable to wear pretty much all day. This shoe provides support and a bit of cushion for when you’re out walking all day. What I love about this shoe is that it’s a great color that you can pair with anything and it has a great design; you can dress up or down the shoe, truly a classic

Classic all white shoe. This is a stylish classic shoe. Looks great dressed up with khakis, jeans or even with gym attire. Clean and sharp.   Unfortunately, they aren’t wide enough for my feet which makes them uncomfortable. I can’t wear these for more than an hour at a time, certainly not all day. They’ll be great for a quick gym trip but beyond that, I can’t see myself getting much use out of them. They feel more narrow than other standard width shoes. If they were wider with a bit more cushion they’d be perfect

What beats an all white Air Force 1?. This is THE pair of shoes to recommend if you only have one chance to purchase a pair of shoes ever in your entire lifetime. Is this a bit exaggerated? NO.   As a child, I always wanted this pair of shoes, but I could never really get it, because it is considered expensive by my family. It's like a dream come true.   The traditional all-white coloring is never boring thanks to the three-panel design and the big swoosh. The iconic style is ever-lasting since 1982, 41 years of legacy put the air force 1 as the jewel of the crown in Nike's entire product line.   You can wear it to any place on any occasion, gym, basketball, commute, work, fine dining, opera, concert, and even interview in some industries.   The shape of the shoes makes them very comfortable to wear all day long, and the cushion underneath brings your delight to a whole new level. It is just right, and it would fit most of us. Maybe, the only thing preventing you from wearing it for more than 24 hours is your mom.   Air Force 1 is the Air Force 1, nothing replaces it, and nothing changes it. I hope years later when my legs couldn't support my body, I can still own a pair of all-white Air Force 1!   May the legacy last forever

Walking on clouds. First, I am not sneaker head. I wear sneakers that are comfortable and functional. Style maybe ranks third. But I do love a simple, classic style like these Air Force 1s. They were comfortable and felt like a big for my feet. However, these seemed to me a little extra "puffy" than I'm used to. They don't quite pair well with my jeans because they feel bulky. Not as much of an use if I'm wearing shorts or sweats

Perfect from day to night. The Nike Air Force 1 07' Flyease shoes are both true to size and fit very well. You can go ahead and purchase your usual size without worry. Just about anyone can wear these thanks to the “minimalist” design- being pure white- (aside from the logo on the tongue). I appreciate that the Nike Air Force 1 07’ Flyease go along easily with any outfit whether casual or dressy. I like the ability to from a walk with my toddler to a dinner with friends in these without the need to change footwear. The AF1 07’ Flyease are very comfortable and offer plenty of support, great for walking or having to be on your feet all day. They are durable and held up well- I’ve been wearing them for 2 weeks and they’re showing no signs of wear and tear. The best thing about these shoes are they are so versatile and comfy making them perfect for any occasion

Awesome shoe!. I love these shoes! They are so easy to pair with any outfit. They are great for wearing all day. I wore them to a concert, on my feet all day, jumping up and down, and they kept me so comfortable. I love the classic white look, they add something fresh to the fit. I will definitely be making use of these!

Classic Nike. What can I say about an all time classic that hasn’t already been said? These AF1s are as great as usual! Perfect fit for the size, elegant for modernized formal footwear. The design is sleek and fitting, as well as, keeping its timeless look. This shoe is a never miss! I can wear this shoe forever and a day without discomfort. Well designed. Cop yours today!!

Love these shoes. Absolutely love all white Air Force 1 07' Flyease. They are very comfortable and fit great. The design of the shoe is very cool. It’s simple but modern with the vintage look to it. After wearing the shoe all day it was very confortable. It didn’t bother my feet at all even after not being broken in yet. I love everything about the shoe from the laces, to the design and the tiny details with the Nike logos on the back. I personally wouldn’t change anything about this classic Nike shoe

Classic AF1. These shoes are just as good as the og AF1. Good quality leather with a nice fit that is pretty true to size. The Flyease heel is a nice added touch that allows you to easily put the shoe on hands free. The shoes have a timeless look that you can pair with any outfit. Very nice padding around the ankle and a comfortable insole

Fresh kicks for the summer. These Nikes feel and look great!! 5/5! They fit well and are comfortable for walking and wearing for the day. Love the all white and first pair I’ve had. Great quality and true to Nike shoes and would buy over and over again

Comfortable Classic. These shoes have the classic design and style with the comfort youd expect from an air force shoe. The design matches casual and more dressed up apparel and easily worn for long periods of time. they accomodate wider feet as well and dont feel toght on my feet. Over all love these shoes!

So Fresh, So Clean.. An absolute classic that anybody can wear, with just about anything! The Air Force 1 low is such a versatile shoe. I was able to dress up & dress down wearing them. They fit great and I was comfortable both standing/walking while wearing them all day. Being leather makes them super easy to clean also!

Classic. Clean. Comfy.. The Air Force One…a staple in the shoe community. Always a classic look. And now with the fly ease, it keeps the tongue centered all day long. No longer do you have to worry about it moving to left or the right. Shoes fits just right. A little snug at first, but as you break it in it’s perfect. A classic look and a classic feel that will go with any fit. MUST COP

Really nice aesthetic shoe. These shoes are my new casual dress choice. They look so good and are super comfy.   I usually have seize 9.5, but they run al little larger, they are a bit too long. The with was perfect for me and I have somewhat wider feet.   It’s a really nice high quality shoe that I love to wear and feel very comfortable with. The aesthetics are the best feature, it really makes my outfit pop.   Since they are white, it is more work to keep them nice and clean, so no roughing around or working in the yard in these. If the seizing was better it would be 5 stars for me

Fantastic Sneakers. These AF1s are sleek, elegant, and continue to embody this iconic Nike look. This pair is very comfortable, a great choice for needing a sharp shoe selection for an all day outing. These shoes can also be worn for any setting; casual, professional, even slightly formal if matched correctly. All in all very functional whatever the occasion may be. This pair did run slightly larger than usual for a Nike shoe, in my experience, but not significant enough to detract from my enjoyment of these AF1s.   So far I have loved wearing these shoes and cannot wait to wear them to more gatherings

Stylish Day to Day Shoe!. The Air Force 1 07' Flyease is a comfortable and stylish shoe! The design of this shoe is clean & modern. The classic white goes with everything so it’s easy to wear throughout the day and well into the night! The shoe fits really well. The shoe isn’t too narrow or too wide. There is great cushion and support in the bottom of the shoes which is so important to me. One thing I really love is how easy they are to slip into! They’ve been well worn since receiving them and they still look & feel brand new! Overall these are a great day to day shoe and they’re perfect for a day or evening out!

Air Force One flyease. Fresh it if the box, the shoe has crisp bold style! The simplicity of the design is a winner! The show is a little stiff out of the box and requires a little break-in time to be totally comfortable. The guy was true to size and felt secure on my feet. The only thing I would change is maybe make the sole a little more plush. Top notch shoe that is second to none!

The Flylease takes Air Forces to the next level!. First, they are so easy to slide on and off. This is my very first pair of the "Flylease" version, and I love them!   Having owned numerous pairs of air forces in the past, they can be quite annoying to take on and off.  Heading on a cruise next week to travel, so these will he the perfect pair of sneakers to show off!  5/5!

Slip On AF1. I've had at least one pair of AF1 in my weekly rotation the last 7 years so I'm very familiar with the look and feel, but the upper heel tab was a game changer.   Rather than being solid stitch, it has a bit of flex that let's you slip the shoe right on - even if it's tied.   This takes a little getting used to - first couple days I felt like the shoe was gunna slip off, but you get use to it quickly.  Finally, they are classic, white AF1 so it looks good with everything. Could easily be the only pair of shoes I wear for a month

Classic Style. This shoe is one of the most classic and iconic shoes when it comes to the Nike brand. The white Air Force can be worn with anything and look good. The flyease version just made it easier to put the shoe on

Comfortable and Good Looking. Very good shoes. Comfortable and good looking. They are well designed and the all-white looks sharp . The backs are very sturdy and it's quite possible to put them on without using your hands. Usually shoes hurt my feet at first but these did not, wore them all day and they remained comfortable. Can't speak to the durability yet, as I have only worn them one day, but will update once I've worn them more

Air Force 1’s. These Air Force 1’s are a crowd pleaser for sure. I have gotten so many compliments since I have begun wearing them. The materials used to engineer this shoe are very durable and even better, they are easy to clean. It did take me a few times of wearing them to break them In, but that is to be expected. The shoe has a classic look and whether your goal is to have a fresh white pair or to get them customized, they won't be missed no matter what outfit you pair them with. I wore this shoe in phases to get them broken in. I wouldn't suggest wearing them out of the box for a full day of walking right away. By the 3rd time I was putting them on, they would have been ready for all day wear. Keep that in mind to stay comfortable. I do love many things about this shoe. The white color is so bright, from the white sole to the white laces, the different materials all find a way to be cohesive. I personally love the tiny silver AF1 badging on the laces. When I look down and see it, I smile every time, because Nike thought about everything! I wouldn't change anything about the shoe, these are classic and they go with everything in my closet. And that's what is most important!

The Breathable Air Force. I am a big fan of the Flyease collection of shoes so this pair was no doubt very comfortable. The design of the classic white Air Force 1's with the breathable inner sole feels so much better after a long day on your feet. I wore these for more than a week and I love how comfortable they are after hours of wear. These are definitely gonna be great for the summer heat and I wouldn't change anything on this classic shoe

Timeless classic with modern tech. These have been one of my favorite renditions of the all time classic Air Force 1 07’. The all white color-way is a sleek look and should be a staple everyone should have in their rotation. The leather upper is durable and has a premium look while also being weather resistant. Got caught outside on a rainy day and my feet were the spared from being soaked. The cushioning was comfortable and responsive with every step. The rubber outsole traction provides great grip and kept me glued to the pavement. I used them for running daily errands to completing an outfit for streetwear. I really enjoyed the flyease feature located on the heel of the shoes that allowed me to slip the shoes on in a quick and efficient manner. The implementation of the flyease technology is a big plus that allows everyone the accessibility to put the shoes on with ease. One thing that I would change about the sneakers would be the weight of the shoes as they felt a bit bottom heavy. Overall, the Air Force 1 07’ Flyease are a must have for sneaker lovers and Air Force fans. I would definitely recommend them and see myself purchasing another pair

The One!. I’ve been wearing these shoes nonstop since I picked them up. They came true to size, fitting my feet like a glove (no annoying blisters or discomfort). The material seems to work well in cool weather, keeping my feet plenty warm… and as the weather has turned to summer this past week, they’ve been surprisingly breathable in the heat.  These shoes look great with khakis (I’ve worn them to work most days) and even better with shorts. I wore them during a fairly intense game of pickleball (hard courts) and a softball game on a turf field, and they served me well in both settings.   Design-wise, it’s hard to go wrong with the classic Air Force one look… I’ve received more compliments than I can count on these shoes, which is not something I’m used to receiving with most other shoes in the closet!   In sum: a home run pair of shoes… highly recommend!

Comfortable and versatile. While these shoes feel a little bit bigger than other Nike shoes I’ve owned, they still are very comfortable. They can be dressed down or up, which makes them versatile and easy to style. The stitching and the material in the whole shoe overall, feel durable. They are comfortable enough to wear all day, but a different insole would make them even more comfortable. Altogether, these shoes are great for every day use, while still maintaining some casual style
Everyday Wear. Remix of a classic. These shoes are just as great as I remember but they are definitely more comfortable. Stylish, minimalist shoe that goes with EVERYTHING!!

Good shows, a little stiff new. Overall, fit and feel are great. Walking felt a little stiff but I think after a few wears they will break in nicely. The look great and the all white is sharp. These were super comfortable to wear to work and would be great in all situations. These are instantly comfortable, and I’m sure they will break in nicely and become a part of my everyday fit

Great comfort level with long lasting, durable material. This shoe provides cushioning and impact absorption with each step. This Air Force 1 is built to last, featuring high-quality materials and solid construction. Its durability contributes to long-lasting comfort, as the shoes maintain its shape and support over time. With a traditional design, the Air Force 1 gives a popular look that will last forever. The all-white finish gives you a look you can wear with any attire, for any event. Its easy-entry FlyEase system gives you a hands-free experience. The system is located in the heel of the shoe, with crisp leather material that keeps its shape. I would recommend anyone this shoe for its classic all-white finish and comfortable, yet durable feel

Classic comfortable shoe aimed at accessibility. These shoes are just classic. They fit just right - a little looser than their running shoes, but not much. The shoe feels very well-made. No loose stitching or grays anywhere.  The design is a staple in any collection - all white with the iconic swoosh. They look very classic. One note on the design is that these are labeled Flyease shoes, but don’t feel like the rest of the line. They have typical laces (rather than Velcro straps, step in, or quick lace systems). I’d love to see some of those accessibility features in a future version. That said, if you tie them a little loose, you can still slip into and out of them easily. The only thing off on the style is the quote large sole (I’d guess intended to add height), which looks a little bit odd proportionally to the rest of the shoe, but it’s barely noticeable when you’re wearing them.   This shoe was comfortable enough to wear all day. I had no problems walking around in them out of the box for several hours on end.   I love the iconic look and all-day comfort of this shoe. Only thing I’d change is added ease of use for different accessibility populations and a summer sole profile, but those are minor things in the context of how comfy and great this show feels and looks

Great shoes!. I really love the look of these shoes for everyday wear with leggings or joggers. They’re comfortable enough to be worn all day, while also stylish and making my outfits look a bit more put together than some other sneakers I own. These fit pretty true to size, maybe a smidge smaller than some other shoes I have of the same size, but overall they fit really well. They felt a little stiff when I first wore them, but once I wore them for a couple of days that feeling dissipated and they’re really comfortable. Overall pretty happy with them!

Classic. These sneakers check off all the boxes for classic style. The all-white color makes them versatile- they look great with jeans or shorts and can be dressed up or down.  They do seem to run a half size too big. The shoes are a bit heavy and stiff, likely because of the thicker sole, which is fine for day to day activities or going out, but I would not wear them for anything athletic and I would not pack them for travel or sightseeing. Keeping them clean and white will be a challenge, but worth it to keep the look

Air Force 1 07' Flyease Fan. When I first received these shoes I was a little concerned since they are all white - I honestly thought "This will take me only one day to ruin." Sure enough, after one use I instantly smudged my shoes. However, when I cleaned them, they were easy to wipe off and get shiny once more! The pattern continued the next day when I smudged them somehow and was able to clean them up. In hindsight, an all-white shoe might not be for me, but these white shoes seem to clean up nicely.  Overall, the fit is very comfortable, forms to my feet, and has no noticeable concerns. The shoe has held together well after miles of walking. I enjoy the look and feel of them when I am out and about. I have gotten compliments on how clean/sharp they look. They take average-looking tennis shoes and make them feel fancy and sophisticated.  When my husband initially started wearing his Air Force 1 07' Flyease shoes, he noted that they pinched his pinky toe the first few days. He said it was like the leather was creasing in the wrong spot, but after wearing them around, they no longer pinch his toes. He thinks that it just took a couple of days of wearing them to form to his feet and walking style. He enjoys wearing them around and does not seem to have as many issues as I do with keeping them clean

AF1 - Flyease. The AF1 Flyease has a great design as it closely resembles the original AF1 ‘07. I really appreciate the Flyease tech being more subtle than other models. I would love to see it mirror the AF1 ‘07 and be a true triple white without the black labels on the tongue, but overall a great execution with a great tech for those looking for Flyease!

Must have!. The fit and feel of this shoe was excellent. The cushioning provided a good level of support, and the materials used felt durable and of high quality. The shoes was stylish and could be worn with everything. They were comfortable enough to wear all day long. The cushioning and support made it easy to walk and stand for the entire day. What I liked most about this shoe was its versatility. It was suitable for various activities, including casual outings and light exercise. If there was one thing I would change about this shoe, it would be the weight. Although they were functional, they could have been a bit lighter. Overall, I was highly satisfied with the fit, feel, design, and comfort of this shoe. Its versatility and attention to detail made it an excellent choice for everyday wear

Pleasantly surprised.. I have worn the same model Nikes for about 6 years.  My first impression of the Air Force One '07 Flyease is they are a very well put together shoe.  They are also more comfortable than I had expected.  I do wish there was a little more arch support, but I can definitely see myself branching out from my goto shoe.  On top of that the flyease is legitimate and definitely makes them easier to put on and off.  I thoroughly enjoy the look of these and expect to be wearing them a lot more

Just like a Regular Pair. The flyease AF1 is very similar to the regular AF1 in terms of looks. You have the same crispy white leather that looks clean with any outfit, the same durable outsole with the air units and the same lace lock as well.   From what I can tell the only flyease component to this shoe is the more collapsible heel when putting these on which essentially makes this a slip on shoe from what I can tell. Otherwise this looks identical to a regular Air Force 1.   I would recommend this product, it’s easy to put on and looks good!

A nice addition to a classic silouhette. This product was one that, at first, I was wary of. The Air Force One is a classic design, and changing it in any way is likely to cause some headaches. But, with this being designed originally for those who have a hard time to put on shoes, I felt this accomplished that without detracting from the product. It looked good, felt good, and compared to my other Air Force Ones, these ones hit all the marks!

New Spin on a Timeless Classic. I’ve worn Air Force Ones since I was in middle school, and there’s still nothing like a fresh all white pair of these classics for your sneaker collection. The Flyease technology took me a minute to familiarize myself with, but once you get the hang of it, it’s pretty intuitive; the Flyease is built into the feel of the shoe to makes these easily pulled on and off without creasing the heel of the shoe. I don’t have a comparison to understand how the Flyease in the AF1 compares to Nike’s remaining lineup that also contains this technology, but I thought it worked just fine and was pretty helpful since I most always put my shoes on and take them off without untying my shoes each time!

Best Shoes Ever. Let’s get straight to the point: the Nike Air Force 1 07’ Flyease may seriously be the best all around, daily wear, casual shoes I have ever owned. I love these shoes!   Everything. Just. Works.   I tend to be a function over form guy, so I’ll start there. Functionally, I can’t ask for anything else from these shoes. I have incredibly flat feet and require a lot of support both in my arch and in the heel. The support that the Air Force 1 07' delivers is top notch. The foot bed provide firm but comfortable support for as much walking as you can throw at them. I have been spending days in these shoes, and never felt any strain on my arches. The support continues through the rear of the shoe, where the heel cup gently surrounds your heel. With the laces tied, my heel is locked into place comfortably with minimal heel lift while walking. That heel cup also is very firm, to the point that if you push in on it from the rear of the shoe, refuses to yield to your pressure. The support support gives confidence and comfort all day long, while a slightly higher padded area at the Achilles Tendon means no chafing or blistering are in sight. Even the texture on the sole was well thought out and executed providing more than enough traction on any surface. Dodging puddles one day, even a wet, smooth surface couldn't convince the shoes to lose traction.   Visually, the Air Force 1 07’ Flyease’s are on point. Form follows function. In my white on white color, they lack any high contrast branding with the exception of a small the Nike Air logo on the tongue. The resultant look is very classic and very clean. To me I feel that this shoe pairs well with many clothes for many occasions, truly complementing my style without being my only style.   That said, the details still shine, and set it apart from my other shoes. Starting at the sole, there is differing textures which roll up the sides, providing not only additional traction, but visual interest. The holes in the top of the foot remind me of basketball shoes, giving a slightly sporty vibe, while providing exceptional breathability. Even the lacing area has detail with a subtle wave around the lacing eyelets, and the silver tag at the bottom of the laces. Together, the details give the 07's a depth of design and interest, while visually maintaining that classic clean look.  So far, I have managed to keep the white on white clean (I've been careful!). so I'm not sure how hard or easy it is to maintain the look. That said, it's a look I am willing to put in the effort to maintain!  In summary, the Nike Air Force 1 07' Flyease shoes are definitely some of the best shoes I have ever owned. Their support gives all day comfort in a style that is simply second to none

A classic staple. These are a classic staple in my closet since I was a teenager. They've held up well over the years, are comfortable, and look stylish. An unpopular opinion but I love my white shoes even more once they're broken in and not so 'white'. While I'm already tall enough, I do recommend these if you want an extra inch or so to boost your height. Right out of the box, they do look chunky but once you put them on it's not so apparent. It will take a few wear to break in, but once you do, they're a comfortable all day walking shoes. These are the perfect classic shoes for generations to come

Very versitile shoe. This shoe is by far my go to shoe when I dress up for special occasions. It’s clean looking and can go with any outfit. And as for comfort and fit, I found that it was a comfortable shoe to walk in. And I did a lot of walking in them. It does take some time to break in but once it does it fits like a glove. And it being my first pair of AF1s and it impressing me says a lot about the shoe

Classic AF-1. The AF-1 is a classic shoe and I was very intrigued about the Flyease technology. Overall this is a standard AF-1 (which I love). The idea of the Flyease for accessibility and convenience is great but not prevalent in this shoe. Those that TRULY need the Flyease feature, will not find these easier than putting on a regular pair of forces

Super comfortable, plenty of style. I would describe this shoe as bright white with clean, classic lines.  The first thing I noticed after trying on these shoes was the cushioning support, like walking across a foam mattress. The extra support made it comfortable to wear all day long. The tread gave excellent grip while walking across damp sidewalls.  The length of the shoelaces was ideal, without any dragging or need to double tie. The leather material is easy to clean and maintain, ensuring a longer lifetime of wear.  This shoe is not one I would wear to exercise in nor use for athletics, however it's a very comfortable shoe to wear for general use.  For such a nice style shoe, they are much lighter than they appear

Classic sneakers with a twist. As with most AF1s, those sneakers offer everyday clean elegance off the bat. Some say this series is heavier than other sneakers, which may well be true, but it does give your foot a more secure grip than others as well, which to me is a plus. The Flyease system hugs your heel in and slightly elevates it when slipping in the shoe, but does not create any ankle chafe or irritation when you walk around (if you prefer low-cut socks, which is the look I prefer with AF1s). Very, very comfortable (great for day-long wearing) and stylish enough that they can go with almost any casual look. The heel support also goes a long way for those of us with a sensitive lower back!

The unmatched staying power of a true classic. It’s well know how these shoes are incredibly comfortable and recognizable anywhere and everywhere, so not going to spend too much time on that. Although they’re tagged as FlyEase shoes, I personally didn’t see too much of a difference from the classic silhouette, other than the tongue being made out of synthetic fabric. It blends perfectly well with the leather and is almost entirely covered by the laces anyway, so no cause for concern. The all-white is pristine, matches with pretty much anything, and wearing these out in daylight is a great way to get all sorts of compliments from people everywhere. Just don’t be alarmed if they have to squint while looking in your direction lol. All in all, very satisfied once again. The only hard part is adjusting the way you walk to avoid creasing the toe box too quickly

AF1 Flyease. The AF1 is a classic sneaker that everyone should have in their closet. It goes with just about everything you wear and will hold up through all types of weather. The all-white is a great summer look, but you can honestly wear them any time of year.   The only thing to be wary about is to most definitely size down. I wear a men’s 10.5 in my other Nike sneakers, but need to wear a 10 for AF1’s

My kids said "I look cool and young"!. The Nike Air Force 1 07' Flyease is a groundbreaking shoe that revolutionizes sneaker design with its innovative technology and accessibility features.   Comfort and Fit: From the moment I slipped my feet into the Nike Air Force 1 07' Flyease, I could immediately feel the superior comfort it offers. The plush cushioning and supportive midsole provide an excellent balance of softness and responsiveness. My kids said "I look cool and young" wearing these. Say no more, I'm sold!  Design and Style: Nike has maintained the iconic design of the Air Force 1 while integrating the Flyease technology seamlessly. The silhouette remains classic, with its timeless appeal and clean lines. The choice of materials is top-notch, offering durability and a premium look. The Flyease closure system adds a modern twist to the design, and the sleek strap complements the shoe's aesthetic perfectly.   Performance: Whether you're strolling through the city streets or engaging in light physical activities, the Nike Air Force 1 07' Flyease delivers outstanding performance. The shoe provides excellent traction on various surfaces, thanks to its well-designed rubber outsole. The midsole's cushioning absorbs impact effectively, promoting a comfortable stride and reducing fatigue. I found the shoes to be lightweight, which further enhanced my mobility. It's worth noting that the Flyease technology doesn't compromise the shoe's performance; instead, it enhances it with its easy entry and secure fit.  Conclusion: In summary, the Nike Air Force 1 07' Flyease is a game-changer in the world of sneakers. Its innovative Flyease technology provides an accessible, comfortable, and stylish footwear option for all. The shoe's exceptional comfort, impressive performance, and timeless design make it a must-have for sneaker enthusiasts. Whether you're an athlete, a fashion-forward individual, or someone seeking a convenient and inclusive shoe, the Nike Air Force 1 07' Flyease is an excellent choice. It's a true testament to Nike's commitment to pushing boundaries and making a positive impact through their products

BUY THESE!. OMG i cannot explain how much i love these shoes. They’re literally perfect. I’m a bit into collecting shoes and try to find something that’s comfortable yet still in style. These are a perfect example of that! They’re lightweight, durable and come in such neutral colors so they’re very easy to style. They’re easy to wear with any outfit and they look good too! They’re different than the basic AF1 and have a sleeker look and i would also say they’re a lot more durable. These are a definite buy!

Unsure about flyease. I love the shoes, I’m just unsure about the flyease part. As an able bodied person I usually stay away from the flyease style shoes purely because I know there are other people who need it, where, yes I love to slide my shoes on and off without having to retie them regularly, but I personally don’t think these are any different than my traditional AF1s. I had to look for what makes these ones flyease style and I personally don’t think it’s enough, but that is also coming from someone who doesn’t use adaptable shoes on a regular basis

Perfect shoe. This shoe is perfect. The white color makes it wearable with just about any outfit. I can wear them with shorts and a t-shirt and I can wear them with jeans and a button up shirt. The shoes are comfortable to wear all day and walk around in. The Flyease makes it easy to slip in and out of. This is the type of shoe I would have multiple pairs of

A Timeless Classic. No matter how many how many new iterations or concepts come out; very few can ever be compared to the classic Air Force 1 Flyease.  This versatile shoe literally can match any outfit or occasion (weddings anyone?), fits true to size, is very comfortable to wear on almost all terrains, and even the detailed quality stitching found on throughout the shoe really tells you the Air Force 1 Flyease is not to be messed with.  It is lightweight and the overall design makes the Air Force 1 Flyease a top contender in anyone’s shoe collection.  My favorite thing I love about the Air Force 1 Flyease is that I can wear all day to work and then out on nights and weekends and still get compliments for how awesome these shoes are.  I would literally change nothing about these shoes!  Highly recommended to anyone who really love a great looking shoe for any occasion

The perfect everyday shoe. The best way I could describe this shoe would be that it’s “average” and that’s not a bad thing. This is the kind of shoe that you could wear on any occasion and for any reason. There isn’t a crazy color scheme or design so it goes with any outfit and the fitting is exactly as the size says and it’s comfortable. Since it is a very average shoe I don’t have much to comment on it other than it does it’s job and it does it well!

Classics for a reason. Sad to say, these are my first ever pair of air force one's. The shoes are a classic for a reason. The only difference between these and the og one's are slight black details (from what I can tell). Definitely thinking about getting some of the other versions

Classic Nelly music videos. These are an absolute icon and a must-have in any sneaker collection. With their timeless design these have stuck around for a while and the white matches everything.  The detail is evident in the stitching. These shoes seem durable, but I’m assuming the creases will stay the more I wear it. I think it will take time to break in to the leather.  In terms of comfort, the Air Force 1 shoes run a little bit big and need time to break into. They feel a little clunky, but it’s that classic look.  If you wanna remember the music videos and wear bandaids on your face, these will bring back the nostalgia

Good update to a classic. The Air Force 1 is a shoe I already know and love.  The fly ease update is a nice touch though and makes the shoes perfect for putting on while holding a baby.  These are extremely comfortable for all day wear and perfect for spring.  I also appreciate keeping the leather for the fly ease design as they are easy to keep clean especially since they are all white

Some Upgrades for a Classic Shoe. The classic all white Air Force 1 is a staple in sneaker culture. There's nothing quite like having a fresh, clean pair of white on white Forces on your feet. The Air Force 1 07' Flyease is essentially that classic shoe, with a couple of upgrades. To start off, the fit was great for me. Some people recommend going up .5 size for forces, but I've always had a perfect fit with true to size and this time around I still experienced that. The materials used feel like the same premium leather for the upper and thick, durable rubber midsole. For me, the design is always a 10/10 with the white swoosh on the white leather upper and white midsole. It's just a classic and can go with any outfit. When it comes to comfort, they're just like any other average shoe to me, although I will say the more you wear and break them in, the comfier they seem, which is a plus, but I wouldn't say they're top tier. I didn't have any issues wearing them all day, however. Let's talk about the differences, or upgrades as I like to call them. Nike implemented their Flyease technology, which essentially makes it easier to put them on, especially when going hands-free. I love this. Not only can anybody benefit, but especially those who may have mobility issues, which is incredible in my opinion. It doesn't change the look of the sneaker either, but definitely improves the quality of life it provides. On top of it being easier to put on, the tongue has some slits to put the laces in so you don't really have to tie the shoes if you didn't want to. Overall, Nike took the classic silhouette and just added more features to make it even better for anyone who wants to enjoy them

Super stylish shoes. These shoes were extremely comfortable as they were used for 6 hours straight & no discomfort in my feet. The product was stiff at first just like any other new shoe but the more use the more comfortable it was. I would definitely wear these out more often and would consider another pair

A shoe for any occasion.. These Nike  Air Force One's are top 5 best shoe of all time. You can literally wear them with anything. The fit and feel are impeccable. The design is flawless and timeless. I definitely wear these all day long, and have probably even slept in them a few times. There is nothing not to like about these classics. If I absolutely had to change anything I would add the iconic Air bubble to match whatever color ways I could imagine

Good Quality Shoe. This shoe is an excellent choice when needing to wear something casual for work or a night out on the town. This shoe seems to have more cushion support around the ankle compared to other versions. I'm glad it has the flyease tech which helps you put the shoe on without having to undo all the laces. I can just slide my foot right into the shoe which is perfect if your having midsection issues. This model has some comfort to it, so you should be ok in them for a day. I love seeing leather on shoes which gives this shoe a certain type of elegance. This is a classic shoe which has been upgraded to a certain degree and no need to change it. Enjoy

Air Force 1 Fly ease. The Nike Air Force 1 is an iconic sneaker silhouette especially in the infamous white on white color way. When I received the box I was very happy to be in the possession of my first pair of white on white air forces. The materials used across the entire shoe make it a model that is very durable and easy to clean. The moderately thick sole makes it so your feet feel protected and the leather upper adds to that sensation. The shoes at first glance are very sleek and sporty but in a professional fashion way. I was surprised by the brightness of the white leather used and I really enjoyed how clean the sneaker feels on feet, almost like the perfectly cleaned tooth by a dentist. The sneakers are easy to put on and comfortable but I wouldn’t say super comfortable. I wore them all day on separate occasions and had no issues or desires to change footwear. I feel that overall the sneaker is the perfect multipurpose shoe since it looks good apart of a very casual outfit or on the other extreme with a suit as well. The sneakers feel sturdy and well rooted almost giving the wearer a sense of protection which I believe stems from the rubber sole. Overall, I love the Air Force ones and was ecstatic to wear them each time, taking pert and continuing a timeless legacy

Very Similar to the non flyease Air Force 1’s. The shoe in terms of size and fit felt slimmer and narrower than the non-flyease Air Force 1. But at the same time the shoe was too big length. The design of the shoe was similar to the regular Air Force 1 and I couldn’t tell much difference when looking at the two. And comfortability wise it took a little time to adjust to the narrowness. But otherwise the comfort is average. And the thing I liked most about the shoe is that it was very well made. The only thing I would change about the shoe is the narrowness of the shoe!

Awesome casual shoe. The Nike Air Force 1 ’07 Flyease is a really cool looking shoe and I was so excited when I got the white for my wife just in time for the summer.  She loves wearing them with casual clothes and even dresses for a fun dressed down look.  The leather is so high quality and this shoe has all the little details like stitching and the little silver tag at the bottom of the shoe laces.   She said these are not the Nikes that she would go for a run in but the padding and the comfy, springy sole make them a great wear for everyday activities.  The sneaker runs bigger than other Nikes and I would size down a half size.  She got her normal size 8.5 and they are fine but slip a bit at the heel and an 8 probably would have been better

Classic Shoe!. The shoe runs true to size and fit my husband perfectly. It wasn’t stiff when wearing them for the first time. He was able to wear them all day and said they are very comfortable and didn’t need to be “broken in”. The design of the shoe is classic and can be worn with almost anything. My husband loves this style but at first thought the platform looked too high. After wearing them he changed his mind as he thinks it’s probably what made them so comfortable. You can’t go wrong when getting this sneaker!

Classic all whites…Fresh!!. Classic pair off the all white air force ones.  Compliments any outfit. The perfect summer sneaker in my opinion. Very comfortable on the foot. Runs true to size. I love the all white color-way.  Easy to match with almost anything. Ive worn this pair for a couple of weeks now. Normally for day to day activities and some light walking/jogging. The sneaker has held up very well and shows almost no signs or wear yet. They have more then adequate padding on the interior and are very comfortable to wear all day. Classic design plus modern day comfort makes this an absolute need for everyone’s sneaker rotation

Such a classic shoe!!. Nothing beats the clean look of an AF1. These shoes will always be in my rotation. I can’t get enough of the bright white color way and the top-notch comfort of this shoe. I can literally wear these all day! I will say if you’re in between sizes, I’d size down — they run a little big. Overall, I’d highly recommend this shoe. Nike hasn’t gotten it wrong yet!
Nicceeee. Always been a fan of air force 1's and the flyease has been added to the list. The shoes are stylish, comfortable, and very fashionable. You can wear them with EVERYTHING! Two thumbs up

A classic shoe that goes with anything!. The Nike Air Force 1 07’ Flyease are actually very comfortable to wear despite the size and thickness of the shoe. The design on this shoe is very stylish since you can wear them with different types of clothing yet they still make everything look good. The all white gives it a more refreshing look and makes it easier to pair them with other colors. One of the things that surprised me as I mentioned before was how you could wear these all day if you wanted to because of their comfort. My favorite thing about them is their old school/ classic feel to them. I can’t really change anything about them since to me they’re a 10/10 shoe

Love these air forces. These are great, I’ve been wearing them for two weeks straight. These have exceeded my expectations and are super comfortable. Being a solid color they are super wearable with every outfit. A great summer shoe! The slip on and off material is also very effective and I’ve been leaving them laced at all times. They are holding up quite well and not showing wear too bad as well

Great classic sneakers. These shoes are great. They have a classic style and a true white color. I took off a star because they were relatively stiff out of the box and they weren't ideal for a full day at a standing desk, I found myself wanting a little more arch support...while these shoes are definitely on the athleisure line I would have expected a little more. That said, for moving around in, no problem at all

A Classic Never Dies. The Nike Air Force 1 has been a classic for decades, since I was a young kid in grad school until now at the age of 40.   The Air Force 1 is good for any occasion any day of the year. I wear it to work with golf pants, to the gym, or to a nice BBQ in the spring/summer.   I will say that once difference I noticed in the Flyease is that the heel is more secure and the shoe feels lighter. The cushion is solid and the overall comfort is a 10/10.   One recommendation is the crease protectors so that you can ensure the show looks fresher longer!   The classic Nike Air Force 1 not only lives on but gets an upgrade!

Exceptional Comfort and Style. I recently had the pleasure of owning a pair of Men's Size 10.5 Air Force 1 '07 Flyease sneakers, and I must say, these shoes exceeded my expectations in every way. Not only do they offer a classic and timeless style, but they also come with a remarkable level of comfort and convenience .  The Air Force 1 '07 Flyease maintains the iconic silhouette that has made this shoe a cultural staple for decades. The crisp upper and clean lines give them a sleek and stylish appearance that pairs well with any outfit. Whether you're dressing up or going for a casual look, these shoes are versatile enough to elevate your style in any setting.  Comfort is of utmost importance to me, and the Air Force 1 '07 Flyease does not disappoint. The cushioning provided by the Nike Air unit in the sole offers excellent impact absorption, making every step feel like walking on clouds. The padded collar and tongue add an extra layer of comfort, ensuring a plush fit around the ankle. Even during long walks or extended periods of wear, my feet remained comfortable and supported.  Durability is another area where these sneakers excel. The high-quality materials used in their construction give a sense of sturdiness and longevity. The rubber outsole provides excellent traction, making them suitable for various surfaces and weather conditions. I have worn these shoes in different environments, and they have held up exceptionally well without showing signs of wear and tear.  Lastly, I must mention the attention to detail in the design. From the iconic Swoosh branding to the embroidered Air Force 1 logo, the craftsmanship is top-notch. The attention to detail and quality make these shoes stand out from the crowd.  In conclusion, the Men's Size 10.5 Air Force 1 '07 Flyease is an outstanding choice for those seeking a combination of comfort, style, and convenience. Whether you're an Air Force 1 enthusiast or someone looking for an everyday shoe, I highly recommend giving these sneakers a try

If they weren’t as heavy, I’d love them. I love the classic design and the style of these shoes. The fit of this shoe was excellent. The fit was my favorite overall part. They were pretty comfortable, but they felt heavy in a clunky way. Some people may not mind this, but I found it to be off-putting. If I could change anything about this shoe, that would be it— I’d make them lighter and easier to wear. They are great for an outfit statement, but not something I’d wear for more than a few hours at a time, definitely not all day long. Overall, I’m very pleased

Best AF1s I’ve ever worn. I really love these shoes! I did not have to size down like I normally do and AF1. Normally a size 10 in street shoes/10.5 sport shoes/9-9.5 in AF1. I didn’t need to size down at all. The fly ease sole is comfy and my arches didn’t hurt and need insoles. Only downside of these is not sure how long they will last me. I can usually have a pair of AF1 in my rotation for a year

Air Force 07' 1 Flyease. The shoe fit and feels fantastic from the first moment I put them on. The Flyease technology makes it easy to put on and take off. I like the classic design of the shoe since it's so iconic, especially in the color white. I found the shoes to be a bit heavy to wear for a full day of walking but, for casual wear they are great! What I like the most was the ease of putting them on and taking them off in no time. It's a great feature that I enjoy using. What I would change is the weight of the shoe to provide a more comfortable experience to wear all day long

Great Shoe. I got these shoes for my husband. We both like the look of this crisp white pair of Nikes. The style is what he likes most about them. He is a P.E. teacher, so he’s on his feet a lot and found these shoes to be comfortable to wear during a full day of school. The fit and feel of the shoe was similar to his other Air Force 1 shoes. Though the heel of this Flyease version does look like it has more cushioning, he did not find them to be easier to slip on than his other Air Force 1 shoes. We love the idea and direction of the Flyease concept, both for convenience and accessibility, however in my husband’s opinion, those who truly need that feature may not find these to be any easier than the original Air Force 1s

Air Force 1 fly ease. The fly ease collaboration with Air Force 1 gave a very clean take on a classic shoe. I loved the subtle additions that fly ease added to the tongue to give it just a splash of character. Definitely a show that allows for many options in what to wear with them and giving off great summer time vibes. With that big said since it was using the classic Air Force 1 silhouette you do have to be careful with the toe creasing so I’d recommend toe guards for your kicks. I would have recommended with also adding color to the aglet of the shoe laces and and adding a design to the sole to replace the air logo to give it more of a collaboration vibe for the next pair

A Classic with a Subtle Twist. The Air Force 1 07' Flyease is, great everyday shoe. It has the look and feel of the classic Air Force 1s, but tactfully implements the new Flyease system. The Flyease system allows for the shoe to be put on easier than regular Air Force 1s and is quite subtle, found in the heel of the shoe. However this makes the shoe have a little heel slippage, so I recommend getting a half size down from your normal shoe size. Other than that it looks and feels great and the material held up very well considering I wore them quite often. You can wear these all day, going to the mall or grocery shopping while staying comfortable. The classic white color literally matches with anything, making it a great choice for everyone, no matter your unique style. Overall the Air Force 1 07' Flyease is a great twist on one of my favorite shoes and are quickly becoming a favorite in my sneaker rotation

Timeless comfort. For a person who does not like to spend a lot of time thinking about matching outfits and shoes, white sneakers are always my go to. These shoes are perfect for any outfit on any day. The design is simply timeless, nostalgic and perfect (especially for a 90ies kid). On top of their great looks, they are super comfortable and roomy. The cushioned and shock absorbing midsole provides comfort even after long periods of walking or standing. The material seems to be pretty durable and easy to clean as well. Time goes on, but air force shoes remain the best

My favorite sneakers. I absolutely love these Air Force 1 07' Flyease. They fit me very well. They do have some extra room in the front and are great for wide feet which I have. They feel comfortable on the toe and heel bottom and side of foot. I love the style of the shoe. All white on sole top tongue and laces, simple and plain which is a plus for me because these could be worn with anything. These Air Force 1 are very comfortable to wear all day long. I have worn them everyday this week and have been comfortable each and every time. Only thing that is a con for me is that they crease at the toe pretty quickly if you wear them everyday. I wish there was a way to not have them crease but still my favorite sneakers

AF1 FlyEase: A STEP in the right direction. It's really nice to see a classic silhouette shoe readily available for people with disabilities.   Let's start out with the familiars - the pair sports the same rubber cut outsole and what feels like an EVA wedge on bottom.  The shoe on foot is very comfortable with the same fairly heavy feel that you're used to with AF1's. The white leather upper and cushioning feels great and even after wearing it for prolonged periods, the shoe hasn't shown much crease in the toe-box. (much to my surprise) The low collar of the shoe rested nicely below my ankle and didn't cause irritation (I'm looking at all you low-sock wearers). Overall, I'd say it fits true to size.  I tend to be a little wide footed, but after a few uses, these felt right.  What sets these apart? The FlyEase system. At first glance, you won't notice a single thing different beside a standard pair of AF1 - because Nike has cleverly hid their system along the swoosh on the sides, connecting at the heel. As you put your foot in, the back collapses allowing you to slide your foot all the way in, as the heel springs back up to provide a secure fit (HANDS FREE!)  These shoes will likely be my go-to for taking the dog out for long walks or when we're in a hurry.  Classic silhouette and the added bonus of slipping them on quickly allowing me to get my kid ready to go?  Can't go wrong

AF1 Triple White. Standard packaging and box but as soon as you open the shoe box all you see is white. Brought back so many high school memories. White shoes were always the pair to wear with khakis and a button down. Shoes feel a little heavy compared to my dunk lows but that’s how AF1 are supposed to feel. I would definitely recommend them for the price and look

Great for daily wear!. As a mom of 5 I am always on the move. When buying shoes I look for both comfort and style. My style is simple because my day consists of working and driving kids around all afternoon. I was leery of buying a pair of white shoes but I am so glad I went with this option! The shoes go great with a variety of outfits, you can easily dress up or down and the crisp white, the style, the lines, they all go great with any styled outfit. I love that the shoes gave me a bit of a height, being only 5'4 I love being able to appear taller without having to wear heels. I really loved that these shoes have the capability of being a year round shoe, you can wear them in any season and still look stylish. The one thing I would change or recommend is to size up if you have a wider foot, this shoe tends to run a little narrow but sizing up will definitely help.  I would recommend this shoe especially for those moms who want a new style but need the comfort of a shoe to keep up with their kids!

Can’t go wrong with a fresh pair of Air Force Ones.. As comfortable as the regular AF1s. Still trying to figure out what makes these FlyEase as they lace up normally, are put on normally. Most Nike FlyEase give you the option to slip them on and off or have zippers or Velcro. These seem like they do not.  Unless I am missing something they seem like regular AF1s to me with a better way to keep the tongue in place

I’m able to walk for the first time in over two years. I asked God for healing and He gave me a pair of shoes, Nike Motiva. I broke every ankle bone and suffered severe dislocation in my right foot, May 2023. They inserted a 12 inch nail from the bottom of my heel to the top of my tibia. I had severe pain with the nail, so they removed it 2 days before Thanksgiving, 2024. I just healed from the incisions and bruising a couple of months ago. I live on a fixed income, so I couldn’t buy shoes until my birthday in May. I had one pair of shoes, in which I only used the left shoe with a walking boot. I bought a pair of Women’s Nike Motiva. I normally wear an 8.5. The website suggested a half size larger, since Nike runs small. I chose a 9.5, since my toes need more room and I need to account for a larger right foot with the bone calcification. I put them on and stood up to take my first step in shoes, in over two years. I don’t have a right calf muscle, due to muscle atrophy, so I have to walk carefully. I could not believe it. I was walking on a CUSHION in shoes for the first time since my ankle break. I don’t have a limp, weird gait or pain. I have more range of motion in these shoes. I look and feel like a normal person. I was in tears… I did not think I could ever take a step without pain, much less without a limp or a gait that was pronounced. I can push the accelerator on the car with my shoes on. I wasn’t able to do that before. The deep cushion on the bottom of the shoes alleviates pain and pressure when I need more range of motion. I asked God for healing and He gave me a pair of shoes, Nike Motiva

Love for nike. I am very picky when it comes to my shoes and comfort level and my loyalty for that brand. My loyalty for nike is 200%. Comfort and beyond. Very comfortable, I work on my feet for 8 or more hours a day 5 days a week, sometimes 6 on hard concrete tile floors. These floors are unforgiving and makes everything hurt from your feet, back, lower back, knees, and legs. I have spent so much money on tennis shoes over the years from Skeachers, Hoka, Nike, Addias, Ecco, New Balance, and many more. I usually have 2 or more pairs of sneakers with me in my car to change out of the morning pair during my lunch. These are the only pair that I didn't have to "break in", or put an insert inside of them. They were instantly comfortable, and first day I forgot that I had them on, because I normally change my shoes during my lunch break. The only reason why I gave them 4 stars is because of color options and the lack of ankle support. But overall I'm pleased with purchase
They are very comfortable to walk in.

Comfort with Cushion. I liked the cushion and comfort as soon as I put on my Nike Motivas. I liked them even more after walking in them the past week. It makes walks with my dog fun and comfortable. I'm ready to purchase a second pair!

Motiva makes me feel like I can walk further. After being diagnosed with arthritis & ruptured ACL in my 30s and not being able to run I've turned to other activities. I love the Motiva, it gives me the support I need, has plentiful cushioning, and it makes me feel like I can walk further. A little leg workout while walking. I dont ever write reviews but had to on this shoe. I saw this shoe and was like I'll try this one as I walk with Pegasus trails Gore tex. One of the best walking shoes. I had a hard time finding walking shoes that didn’t aggravate my shins. These are the only pair that I found to cause me no pain in my shins walking 6-10 miles in them with no issues

Very comfy and the rocker sole gives your legs an extra workout. They're so cushy and comfy and look good. Just be aware that if you wear the all day your legs may feel a bit sore. Remember fitflops? Rockn' Walkin'. I walk for exercise over 5 miles a day and needed a new pair of walking shoes. I took a chance on the Motiva as  I just loved the pinkish hue of the canvas. So Comfortable!. The most comfortable shoes I have ever worn from the moment I put it on. They also provide great support for my high arches. I want to wear these shoes everyday. Highly recommend!
One of the best walking/running shoes. Very comfortable! Walking or running, these shoes are light & durable. I own 4 pairs now of the Motiva. Highly recommended!
Love them!. The are perfect fit, color and feel. So comfortable to boot!  Would recommend and buy them again :)
The Perfect Bounce!. Love my Motiva's!!! They feel like you are walking/running on clouds. They feel great road running and on the treadmill.  Had to get my husband some and he loves them.  Get them!
Ummmm WOWWWWW!!!!. These are absolutely amazing and so comfortable. The cushion is amazing. I seriously want these in all colors! The fit is true to size and exactly as pictured

Walking on Clouds. COMFY. Use them as my daily walking shoe when I walk my pups. All that cushioning makes for a super comfy ride, and the "rocker" feature is cool. Absolutely the most comfortable walking shoes I've ever had

Comfortable for all day wear. Since getting these shoes I have worn them religiously to work every day. Best shoes for high arches. My feet have high arches and I’ve dealt with feet pain for most of my life. Get them !. As a theme park person, I have never had a pair of shoes that didn’t hurt my feet by the end of the day….until I found these. If you do a lot of walking or standing, get these! They are like walking on a cloud

WOW 🤩. I was skeptical but I ❤️ these shoes! For the first time ever my dog wasn’t pulling me when I took her for a walk! They are very springy and comfortable. They fit true to size for me. Best walking shoe EVER!!!. The most comfortable and cushioned shoe EVER!!! I love it so much I just ordered the second color.  I will anxiously be awaiting new color launches in upcoming seasons.  This shoe will keep you comfortable while you keep moving forward.  I highly recommend it!

These Nikes are the best shoes I ever bought from Nike I wish that they would come in different colors however I purchased the black pair and the 8 hours on a concrete floor make a top heavy person like myself feel as if I have happy feet meaning the shoes feel as if your walking on a cushion day

Another great creation from Nike. I'm a Nike guy from my high school days many moons ago and I've managed to stay loyal. Now for the new Motiva...it's a good looking shoe and hats off to Nike for always innovating. I just got my shoes delivered and right out of the box they're sleek and eye catching. Space suit boots.. Honestly the comfiest trainers I’ve ever worn. Comfortable and Standout design. I recently tried out the Nike Motiva Walking Shoes with a sleek design, and they definitely exceeded my expectations in comfort and style. When wearing them for my daily walk I noticed a cloud-like cushioning that provided excellent support for my feet. They were comfortable for my workout and then straight to running errands!   The level of comfort these have is truly impressive. These have a plush interior lining that cradled my feet, the design is also so sleek and stands out. Whether I'm going for a quick jog or all-day wear chasing after kids, these shoes keep my feet comfortable and protected throughout
Motiva. Loved the design and overall look of this shoe! It has great cushion for all day wear just found them to be a little tight in the width and maybe better suited for a narrow foot

Pinch. The Nike Motiva shoes were not true to size, there was extra in room above the arch of the foot and tight in the toe of the shoe. Odd but comfy. I am confused about the curve of the sole... it is hard to keep balance at times but it is is very cushiony

Great Buy. Wow! I was surprised with these shoes. Initially, I didn’t love the look due to the ripples along the bottom and chunky sole. However, I quickly got over the strange look when I spent a day in them. They feel like walking on bubbles! It took only a few minutes to get used to the feeling. They match any outfit and feel great for normal daily use and long walks. I wish they came in other colors like khaki as I’d love to buy more to wear to work. I stand on my feet all day but need them to match my business casual style

Not deterred by the underfoot feel from the exaggerated rocker. I really enjoy the fit and look, but I always notice the exaggerated rocker when I switch into these shoes.  It is such a different underfoot feel for me that it takes some time for me to stop thinking about it. Clearly the rocker design is something new for me versus shoes I have owned in the past.  Yet, the rocker is not deterring my interest because I tend to favor these shoes for all my outdoor activities - jogging, chasing my kids, errands, or night out. I am giving the shoes 4 stars because I continue to notice the underfoot feel.  All other aspects are performing at a 5 stars level for me

Great pair of lightweight shoes. These are a great pair of shoes that make you feel like you are walking on air. As someone who deals with back pain, I am always looking for a pair of athletic shoes that are easy on my lower back. These shoes are fantastic and unlike anything I’ve worn before. The first time you put them on, you almost feel like you are rocking in them. After you get used to them, you immediately notice how the shoes are designed to take the pressure off of your pain points. And as a bonus, they look great! I’ve received multiple compliments from others on my new shoes. I do believe I’ve found a pair of shoes I intend to wear for a long time

Comfortable and innovative. I've been wearing the Nike Motiva shoes for a few weeks now and I'm really happy with them. They're super comfortable, and the rocker design makes walking and even just standing for long periods of time really comfortable on my feet. I've worn them for up to 8 hours at a time without any discomfort.  The fit and feel of the shoe is great, although they do run a little bit on the small side for my feet. The material is soft and breathable, and the shoe feels very supportive.  The rocker design is also a nice touch. It takes some getting used to, but once you get used to it, it's really comfortable. I think it might also take a little bit of getting used to wearing shoes that are just a little bit thicker/deeper than normal shoes.  Overall, I'm really happy with the Nike Motiva shoes. They're comfortable, stylish, and supportive. I would definitely recommend them to anyone looking for a new pair of walking shoes

Lightweight shoes that are supportive of my stride!. First and foremost, the Womens Motiva Running Shoes are incredibly comfortable. I really like how padded the inner sole is because it adds extra cushioning and support around the ball of my foot when I run. They are very supportive and my feet don't ache as much as when I run with other sneakers. I also like the lightweight design because the material is breathable and the shoes keep my feet cool and dry during a long jog on a hot day. The outer sole of the shoes is pretty unique as well and provided excellent traction when I took a light jog during the rain. Overall, these are great sneakers for walking or jogging and they look unique which is an added bonus

A Great Walking Shoe. These are a great shoe if you’re doing low impact exercises, but want high support.   The sole of the shoe is incredibly thick, but flexible. I was worried that the shoe would be too rigid for long distance walking, but the bottom is soft and the shape of the sole provides a smooth glide with each stride. I’ve never had a pair of shoes with a “rocking” step so the first few I wore them I swear I activated muscles in my calves I haven’t ever before.   I’m a commuter in the city and have been wearing them daily for my walk to and from the train station and into the office. I have noticed some wear on the cushioned sole in the form of minor creasing, but that just goes to show how soft the shoe is. I’ve been able to wipe the white soles clean with a wet rag and the color looks as good as new.   Overall, they aren’t a shoe I would personally wear all day; however, they are a stylish way to make my walks more comfortable while providing an extra “oomph” to tone my muscles

Very comfortable for walking and everyday wear. These sneakers are true to size and very comfortable. It took a little while to get used to the rocking design of the sole because I typically wear flat sneakers but it does make the shoes comfortable to wear all day. I don’t prefer to run in them but they have been great for walks with my dog and playing with daughter. They are easy to get on and off which is very important. I love the all black designs and the design down the front of the shoe laces adds unique detail. The white foam on the outsole quickly started to looked wrinkled after just a few wears but does seem easy to clean so far

Nice and Comfortable Shoe. I recently got the Nike Motiva shoes in the black and white colorway. There are a lot of features that I really enjoy about this jogging shoe and at the top of the list is how comfortable and supportive they are. My first few times trying them out, I noticed how well they gripped the pavement. The hump near the back of the shoe, while also giving extra cushion for my foot, also feels a bit like I'm walking on marshmallows in that particular spot. Hopefully that will go away as the shoe breaks in more but is worth mentioning that it might take some adjustment. I also noticed my heel catches when going down the stairs due to the protrusion which is a bit annoying. It's nice to have the extra support but visually it is a bit strange to have it stick out so far. There is also a lot of white on the midsole and I do worry about it looking dirty fast.   Even though I'm not in love with the styling, I'm not going to deduct any stars as the soles are very cushy and the rise at the back of the shoe does make it easier to take consistent strides. In fact, I feel like my stride is longer so it gives me more confidence to go a longer distance. I also appreciate how breathable these are as the mesh vents and cools my feet quickly. Which is especially nice to have plenty of airflow as we head into warmer weather.   These Nike Motiva's are also comfortable for daily wear. Sometimes shoes can run too narrow for my feet but I do not have that issue with these shoes. They seem to run true to size. I like the wider section at the ball of my feet and I feel very stable wearing them. I have to occasionally stand for long periods of time on a cement floor at my job and these have helped my feet immensely. They feel pampered rather than sore and exhausted at the end of the day. Overall, for comfort and function, I would highly recommend these shoes

Nike Motiva review. I took these shoes for a few 3-4 mile jogs straight out of the box. They were extremely comfortable and didn’t need to be broken in whatsoever. The sneaker has a plush ride. I prefer more cushion in my sneakers for both walking and jogging and the Nike Motiva has that while still allowing you to feel connected to the road. The upper material is comfortable and hugged my feet in all the right places without feeling too tight. It took a few minutes to get used to the feel of the exaggerated rocker motion of the shoe, but once you are comfortable it makes you feel like you are being propelled forward while walking/jogging. The design is modern and I am a fan of the simple black and white color scheme. The sneakers look and feel good and I look forward to adding them to my rotation when I go for a walk or light jog

Stylish and comfortable shoes!. My son has wide, large feet, and it’s difficult to find shoes that fit him great. I can’t believe how well these shoes fit him! They don’t feel tight on the sides without being too wide. How well they fit him is my favorite part about these shoes! He has been wearing these to school all day and says they are the most comfortable shoes he’s ever owned and that they feel cushioned. I love that most of the shoes are all black, including one of the logos with a white sole. On the bottom of the sole, it’s wavy, which is unique. On the bottom of the shoes is plenty of grips to give him traction

Great shoe to keep you moving. The wavy sole that curves up at the heel took some getting used to. Since the sole doesn’t sit flat, you rock backward and forward a bit. I found that this was more prominent the first few days and became less noticeable afterward. However, although it sounds like a downside, I consider it a benefit for two reasons. First, it made me want to keep walking rather than stand still. Second, it’s a bit like lumbar support for my arches. When I had to stand around in airport lines last week, my feet didn’t hurt as much as usual.  Another aspect of this shoe I really like is that the tongue is attached on the sides (inside) all the way to the base of the shoe. The extra fabric keeps the tongue securely in place.  The fabric seems durable, although the large white area between the main body of the shoe and the sole is a bit squishy. We’ll see how well it holds up.  The lace holes are reinforced. The laces stay snug and straight.  I love the design of this shoe. It’s classic without looking outdated. Fit is spot on.  Overall, great shoe. Attractive. Comfortable all day whether walking, running, or sitting around

All day comfort and style to go anywhere. I am a dad to 2 very active boys, so I appreciate a sneaker that I can put on in the morning and be ready for whatever the day brings.   The Motiva is a great shoe for that. Style to go with anything, comfort to spend all day in, and support perfect for a family walk that turns into a jog.
