In black, the Motiva is understated at fits in anywhere, but the subtle weave and variety of materials save it from looking boring.   The rounded and raised arch makes it feel like the shoe wants you to walk. It is most comfortable in stride, and might be a bit too aggressive an arch if you’re just going to be standing around. If your plans include a lot of walking or jogging, though, these are excellent. I sometimes have plantar pain and cramping after a lot of time on my feet, and I have not had any issues so far in these

Great running or all day shoe. The Nike Motiva shoes are comfortable and with well supporting sole. I usually need to use insoles but they were not needed with these! The design was great visually. Not too much bling or too drab. Just a happy medium. They are great as running shoes but were comfortable enough to wear all day long. They are a well made shoe all around

Looooveee!. These shoes are a must have for ANY runner, but not only runners- with me being a type 1 diabetic, I have also found these are the most comfortable shoes when dealing with my neuropathy.  Not only do I not experience nearly as much foot or back pain, but when I walk or run in these, the shoe gives me a little extra "bounce" in my step. These are perfect for any physical activity, whether it be walking, running, jogging, sports, etc. I would 100% recommend to any runner, or anyone suffering from foot pain due to poor footwear

Premium Style. The Nike Motiva shoes are some of the most comfortable shoes I have every worn. I love to run and do low/medium impact workouts and these shoes have filled the need for reliable and comfortable shoes so seamlessly. Right out of the box they required no "breaking in" for them to be comfortable and maintained their comfort all day. I absolutely love the style of these shoes and look forward to using them more and more in the future. If searching for all day comfort without having to give up premium style, these are the shoes for you!

The Shoe of the Future!. My husband was able to test out the Nike Motiva and he found them to be a very unique shoe.  These shoes are great when being active and running or playing sports. They help with staying light on your feet and just make you want to keep going.   However when being stationary, the shoes are definitely something to get used to. They almost feel like a rocking chair in shoe form. Also they are a bit wider than most other shoes.   All in all, the Nike Motiva is an innovative shoe and I would recommend this shoe to any person looking for the perfect shoes to be active in

Motiva Mentions. Really love the Nike Motivas!  My foot is big and rather wide. (13). Up until I tried these, I could only get shoes wide enough from a different manufacturer. At last, a 13 that isn’t designed for a ‘narrow’ foot!  Who’s got a 13 foot that isn’t wider than your average size 9-11??  Not me and probably not anyone!  That said, the comfort and style are AMAZING!  I am retiring my older 13 WIDE shoes (which are actually wider than I need) and the Nike Motivo are my new GO TO !  They’re awesome for walking, running and because they look so darn cool, I wear them everyday. I know, not ideal thing to do with a workout shoe but that’s how much I love them. I get compliment after compliment when I wear them out and about. The soles have great cushion power and they are beyond comfortable.  Arch support is amazing too, another fault of others I’ve owned. No need for an insert here, thankfully because that always seem to change the overall fit and feel. I’ll probably get another pair to dedicate to just exercising because I’m hooked!  Definitely recommend these and can’t wait to get a second pair. So cool

Motivated by Motvia. The Nike Motiva was a great shoe overall! The Motiva fits true to size and I really like the feel of the shoe. I will say that it took some time getting used to walking with the bumps on the bottom, but after going on a walk in them I got used to it. As I am someone who is a klutz, I was very worried about tripping when I first tried them on; however, I don’t even notice the slight rocking feeling anymore. Now they are my go to shoes when we go for a walk! It is almost like walking on a cloud, because they are so light and squishy. There is good arch support, too, which is an added bonus! I feel like I have gone on more walks since getting these shoes! I am not a huge fan of  the platform look, but with how much padding there is, it makes sense and I quickly got over that. I like that there are bright color options, as well as classic colors. I really like the black and white option because I can wear it with basically any outfit. This is definitely a shoe I could wear all day and be comfortable in!

Sleek Walking Shoe. Nike has designed another great shoe. This walking shoe is great for more than walking. Providing optimal support for all sports. Like basketball, running and skateboarding. This shoe provides comfort all day long. The design of the shoe is very sleek and the shoe is made to last. Definitely recommend, you want regret it

Great Shoe for a Busy Mom. The Women’s Motiva is such a comfy shoe! The shoe fits true to size. It’s so cool these shoes were designed especially for women. It provides amazing support for your foot in all areas.  The curved sole helps support good posture and makes my body feel much more aligned. These are comfortable for all day wearing and would be great for working out! They are kind of bulky and definitely not a minimalist shoe. Overall, these comfortable and supportive shoes are great for moms, especially those with posture problems or back discomfort. However, the shoe is very bulky and the feel can take a while to get used to. All around a great shoe for a busy mom!

Cushiony. These shoes had thick soles and were cushiony. They had great arch support and were comfortable to wear all day. The bottom of the shoe is rounded and thicker in the middle. It’s an interesting design and I wasn’t sure about the tread but once the shoe was on it and had weight pushing down on it, it flattened and the thicker part in the middle gave extra arch support. I think it’s a great shoe for people looking for arch support and something a little more cushiony and comfortable than normal

Makes movement really impactful. These sneakers have strong arch support which is helpful for my plantar fasciitis as I am on my feet a lot. The arched nature of this shoe makes it a little different at first but after a few minutes of walking I got the hang of it and now love wearing them!   The sleek design gives you the best of both worlds for a walking shoe. They look athletic and sleek and I even wore these out to dinner with my partner after walking long distances in them for fitness during the day. These can be worn in a variety of environments and I am going to buy a pair for my mother as a gift for her birthday

Walking On Clouds. I absolutely love these shoes. They fit perfectly and literally feel like walking on clouds or pillows or something. Can't really describe it, but I love the bounce and the light feeling I get from the Motivas. I'm actually in Clinical Massage Therapy school and am on my feet all day, and desperately needed some comfortable closed toe shoes to wear during my 11 hr school days. I also took an hour walk in these shoes on one of my lunch breaks to break them in and they did not disappoint. I like the shape, color, and comfortability of the pair I got so being stylish and the ability to wear them with a variety of different outfits is definitely a plus. I'm a mother to a very active soon to be one year old as well, so I've definitely put these shoes through the ringer the past couple of weeks. I'd definitely recommend to anyone with an active lifestyle looking for a comfortable shoe for the duration of the day

Great for people looking for extra height!. I was so excited for Nike's Motiva running shoe since I'm always looking for comfortable ways to add extra height (I'm 5'2). They are very stylish and look especially great with casual leggings and workout gear. I wore these during my trip to Asia and walked quite a bit in them. Overall, they're comfortable for all day wear and I was happy about the breathability. However, these shoes do run small. I've owned more than a dozen Nike's and none of them made my toes feel tight like the Motiva's did. I would advise going half a size up for comfort. The back heel of the shoe is also very soft..if you're lazy like me and hate to untie your shoes every time you put them on, you may be a bit annoyed when you have to bend down and readjust the heel.  Overall, these shoes are super cute and perfect for added height but beware, you will need to go up half a size for ultimate comfort!

What an incredible shoe!. When I first saw these I was little put off. After wearing them, I immediately changed my mind. These shoes are so comfortable! I used them for walking, running, and every day wear. I could wear these all day without a single complaint. At first I questioned the way they looked and then I realized  that they are like walking on a cloud and it all made sense. This shoe was designed with comfort and performance in mind. I literally run and walk faster. Aerodynamics play a role. I'm convinced of it. I loved the comfort of this shoe and I love the performance of these shoes. The only thing I might have changed at first, is the color. But after wearing the shoe, the bright green has grown on me and I actually love everything about them. As an active mom of six and always on the go, I need comfortably. This show delivers and seems well made.  10/10 highly recommend. This is one purchase you definitely will not regret!

Comfortable walking shoe. The women’s Motiva running shoes are wonderfully comfortable! They are great for all day use. The cushioned soles are my favorite part. After a long walk my feet are still comfortable. I really like the grey neutral colors with the fun pop of bright green. The rocker bottoms took some getting used to. The rocking design makes for a great walking shoes but I do not love them for running. While the lightweight fabric is very comfortable, that is the one part I would change because my toe seems to poke up and you can see that. I worry that over time this part will wear and cause a hole. Overall, these shoes are perfect for someone who is looking for a casual walking shoe

Motiva around town. There are so many reasons why I was excited to try out the shoes, but mostly because, as I have gotten older and almost 40 years old, running for the last 20 years has really taking a toll on my lower back.  So seeing the shape of the running shoe made me so excited to get on and try it out.    I have to say that the women’s Motiva running shoe is probably in my top three runners of all time.  Even though I no longer run, I walk study and usually on an incline, so they can be still hard on my lower lumbar spine.  Right away the shoes gave a cloud like cushiony feel that made it really easy to go from walking on flat surface to walking on an incline without losing balance.  I also love the laces I know that sounds crazy, but so many times and runners all notice but having laces that stay tied during your workout session is crucial. So many times you distract yourself by having to tie a shoe over and over again.  The women’s motiva running shoe stayed tied for the entire workout session even onto my errands after my work out. I think that is a winner of a shoe when they stay tied for that long.  And lastly, the aesthetic for the show are impeccable.  They really leave that only the person wearing the shoes but others seeing the shoes on asking. Where did you get those shoes? I love them.  Not only is it important for people to know about great shoes but also it’s important for yourself to have confidence and that always boost my confidence when somebody wants to wear the shoes and I wearing.  I would hands-down buy a shoe and every single color if possible. They are comfortable, light in weight, as well as amazing for your lower back for those with lower back problems. I hope everyone has a chance at least my lady friends to go out and get the women’s motive are running shoe. You won’t regret that purchased one bit

Mike Motiva Running Shoes. So I just got these shoes a couple of weeks ago and let me tell you, these sneakers are so comfy. I got the light grey, white and lime green color. As soon as I put them on I was in love. The bottom of the shoes have a sort of bouncy feeling. So it feels like you’re springing into your steps which makes it so much easier to walk or run. No breaking in needed. And I have wide feet, they didn’t feel tight or anything. I been using them for running and jogging either at the park or the treadmill and I just feel so light in my feet. Definitely recommend for anyone that does a lot of walking. 10 out of 10

Vibrant Running Shoes. The design of the Women Nike Motiva shoes is visually appealing, and has a futuristic feel. The shoe's comfortable and wellpadded, and the curved sole adds extra comfort that replicates the natural shape of our feet, which provides excellent support. The breathable material of the shoe offers good ventilation, keeping my feet cool and dry. The curvature of the shoe promoted a smooth heel-to-toe transition, running with these shoes was a breeze and fun once you get used to them. The shoe is sleek and modern in its smoky gray shade, while the highlighter green on the heel adds a touch of color. I'm wearing an 8 U.S. size, and the Nike Motiva was running on the smaller side. I like wearing thick cotton socks but with the Motiva running shoes, I have to wear thinner socks. The curvature of the sole was something to get used to, but after wearing them for the second time, I would never wear another running shoe! The only drawback I've found was that the Nike Motiva running shoes were on the smaller side. The shoe’s material is breathable, but I couldn't wear them during the winter because rain will go through them. Overall, I would highly recommend the Nike Motiva runners shoes for those that need the extra heel support

Super Comfortable!. I love these sneakers! I walk or jog in these every morning and they're so comfortable and breathable. It gets pretty hot where I live so we've had some toasty mornings already and my feet don't feel hot and gross in these like most sneakers in the hot sun. The soles are really thick and comfortable but feel lightweight and have a great shape for movement. The upper material is stretchy but not loose so they don't squeeze my feet at all but also give good support. I really like the subtle splash of green without being obnoxious. My only complaint is the laces are really stiff and have to be loosened quite a bit to put the sneakers on but laces are easily replaceable so I would still highly recommended these sneakers. These are a favorite for me, I'll definitely be wearing these for a long time

Great shoes. I can't say enough great things about these shoes!! Not only are they super comfy, but I love walking/jogging in them and I have gotten quite a few compliments on them when wearing them. The line green really pops against the white. I think the wavy sole must help with the comfort factor. These are probably the most comfortable pair of Nikes I've owned. Would by again

GREAT WALKING SHOE. The shoe fits perfectly, I’ve never had a shoe be this comfortable before. I had woke Yeezys that were very comfortable but these are way better and cheaper. I feel like I’m walking on clouds, I worked an 8 hour shift in a warehouse in these bad boys and I felt just fine after!

It's interesting :). Womens Motiva Running Shoes is made for walking, jogging and running.  That's why it has a very interesting 'shoe bottom' that I have never seen before.  It has a 'rocker geometry' where I can 'rock' my feet and transition from jogging to running easily.  It took me a while to get used to it as the 'feel' is totally different than normal running shoe.  But once I get a hang of it, it's awesome!! I enjoy wear the shoe and the movement it brings.  It helps my feet to feel less fatigue and less discomfort.  It's very comfortable and I highly recommend to anyone who enjoy walking, jogging and running!! I also love the neon green contrast color of the shoe!

Amazing!. I really love these shoes!! The size fit perfect, very comfortable overall. They feel like I’m walking on clouds. I have worn these to work for over 9 hours straight and I didn’t even want to take them off at the end of the day. They look stylish and not too over the top. The bright green accent color gives a fun, edgy look. I would definitely recommend these shoes!

Ok for walking, don’t try to run in them.. The Motiva is in many ways aesthetically interesting, but that’s about as far as the positives go on this shoe. Upon seeing it, I thought the wave patterns in the sole would provide interesting traction and movement but they just get like the shoe was never stable.  The real problem with the shoe is the width of the midsole and the heel. It’s so wide that it feels like a brick user your foot. Because of this strange construction it made me walk like an awkward duck or one of those videos where a dog is wearing boots for the first time. I thought that’s perhaps this was just awkward during walking and that maybe it would be beneficial in running but I was very wrong. The clunkiness of the shoe made running nearly impossible. It was an awful experience.  I can’t say I would recommend this shoe for any purpose. Sadly it was just uncomfortable and poorly designed

The Nike Motiva. I got these shoes for my father who is very picky about shoes, he really likes them. He has mentioned that these shoes feel like he is walking on clouds. The soles of these shoe are thick making them very comfortable. These shoes also have great arch support marking them great for walking long distances. My father has the black and white pair which allows him to wear them with any outfit. He mentioned that at this time there is nothing he would change about this shoe, so far they are amazing

Motiva Running Shoes. I love the fit and feel of these shoes. They are comfortable enough to wear throughout the day as walking or running shoes. The design is stylish and sleek. I loved the color of the shoes the most. They are classy and the neon green adds a nice pop of color. I would not change anything about this shoe

Excellent Shoes. All day Comfort, gives bouncy spring in step.  True to size. Lightweight and exceptional traction. Great running shoe and or all day wear. Love the look of these shoes too, they motivate me to get more exercise, lol

Very comfortable. I love these motiva running shoes! They have a large sole that helps with running momentum. Very comfortable to wear for long periods of time as well! The colors are perfect, mostly neutral with a fun pop of color! As with most Nike shoes, I find they run a little small

Comfortable and Supportive, would buy again!. The motive running shoe are one of the most comfortable shoes I have. I tend to reach for these more than I do any other shoe since Ive had them. They're easy to put on and take off- Im really impressed with the comfort and durability, too! The bottom sole feels so soft when you're walking it feels like you're on marshmallows! I always pair it with leggings and receive so many compliments when I have them on. Although I don't use these for running, I use them for long hours of standing and walking. The real test was at Disneyland and had no problems! Would definitely recommend this shoe to family and friends. Wish they had a variety of colors, I would definitely be splurging on all the colors!!

They were perfect for airport running. I got these the day before traveling with my kids so so I decided to put them to the test. When I first put them on it felt very strange and I didn’t know if I would be able to run in them, but after walking around I noticed they were very comfortable. At the airport I ended up walking, jogging and running around with my two young kids and my feet felt great! I wore them everyday while I was on vacation with my kids and they were excellent shoes

Love!. I love these shoes! They are extremely comfortable. Perfect for going on a walk, run, or when you are going to be on your feet for a long time. They run true to size and I really liked the pop of green color on them

Super comfortable. These shoes are great! The rocker sole is surprisingly very comfortable. I felt a little more pep in my step while wearing these. I normally have very bad foot problems, but even after being in these all day, my feet had no pain! I think these would be very good for running longer distances, but for now I have used them for running short distances or just all day use. The only complaint I have is that the shoes laces do not stay tied unless I double know them. Other than the shoe laces, I have no complaints. The color is also great since it's pretty neutral, but the splash of bright green adds a fun touch!
Very comfortable. This shoe is very comfortable! It took a little bit for me to get used to waking in them, they’re very springy. I think they will be great for casual running and walking

Excellent, comfy shoes for everyday and walking. Fit:   average/a bit narrow in the midfoot - wider in the forefoot and toe box area.  Makes for a nice bit of wiggle room for your toes, while giving you decent lockdown in the midfoot.  comfort/feel: One of the most comfortable shoes I've worn.  the upper is a soft, thin, stretchy, breathable fabric which made for a very pleasant wear.  It's sturdy in the heal with lots of padding.  It was clear that comfort was the main goal, and they succeeded.  Performance: This shoe is perfect for walking or a light jog on even terrain.  I used them or walking, and was extremely happy with the comfort.  However, because of the flexible upper the lockdown isn't great even when you tie them tight, so if you're someone looking for a running specific shoe I would look elsewhere.    As you can see from the pictures, the outsole is rounded and thick - especially under the arch.  This makes it so you really roll from heel to toe when taking steps.  I imagine they have a similar feel as something like a sketchers shape-up.  It also has a lot of give making for a very cushioned ride, but still feels pretty stable.  This makes it very comfortable for walking but maybe not the best for much else.  Style: Pretty good looking shoes - I definitely got a few compliments!  Nike doesn't often miss regarding style of their casual/running shoes, so not too surprising here.  Durability: Haven't had them very long, but I've worn them a few times a week for about a month and they're showing little to no signs of wear.  Seems like they will last a good long time  OVERALL:  Love these shoes for everyday/walking and will definitely be keeping them in the rotation

Walking on Clouds. So, at first sight these aren't my favorite looking shoe since the soles are so high. But, they are really comfortable and are great for going on long walks. I would recommend these for people who need extra arch support. My teenage daughter said she would wear these to school for gym class

Motion Transfer Comfort. I liked the fit although maybe a little bit big on me. I wear a 10 in sneakers but I had about a half inch of toe room. That did not effect the comfort and performance of the shoe at all. I loved the motion transfer feel of this shoe, although it takes some getting used to at first, as they do tilt backwards because of the heel and padding design. Once you get used to that, it's like walking on a cushion that moves your feet along when you walk. This is a designed Walk Shoe, so it's great for mall walking, taking a stroll outside or anything you really want to do with them. You can stand stationary when you want to, but I don't think I would do a weight workout in these   I like the design of the shoe, it's Flyknit upper looks nice and lets your feet breathe, the lower motion transfer cushion looks cool with it's ridges and sloped up rear heel  The shoe is definitely comforfable enough to wear all day long, I have a bad back and was able to do hours of shopping that I couldn't do in other shoes because of the pain it would cause. I liked the motion transfer feel of this shoe the most, it was definitely something you could feel propelling your feet forward. I don't think I would you change anything about the shoe, maybe the back heel tip, but I think that's part of the design of why they transfer the motion so well

Walking on air for people with high arches!. These shoes are like walking on air, especially if you have high arches. I have never worn a more comfortable pair of shoes. Typically I have to wear inserts for general walking and working out in order for my feet to stay comfortable, however with these shoes they aren't necessary.   I love these for weightlifting because my feet are able to stay flat on the ground but feel like they're resting on clouds.   These are the types of shoes you can wear all day. I wear them for running, chasing my 3 kids around and even if I want a cute pair of sneakers for athleisure wear. My feet feel fabulous at the end of the day.  They are incredibly durable and look super cute. But between having wide feet and high arches it is rare to find such a high quality shoe. Nike has become my go to brand with this release!

Extra cushioned and rounded sole runners. These running shoes have the classic Nike comfort and the upper seems durable enough to handle mid to long mileage runs. I like the neon accents, especially for visibility.  The main thing that makes these different from the average running shoe is the thick, rounded sole that is supposed to help propel you forward. This feature seems to work as intended, but it was a miss for me. I prefer a thinner sole and the feedback from the terrain that allows.  The shoes are very comfortable and have great cushioning, but I found the round sole distracting

Fantastic shoe. This is definitely one of the most comfortable walking/leisure shoes I’ve owned. At first I was intimidated by the style, with the “platform” look to them, but it is certainly trendy and once I wore them I understood it was not just for looks- it creates a soft, yet firm padding. It feels like the shoe molds to your foot/walking pattern. Overall this is a great shoe- I’d 100% recommend. It fits true to size
Extremely Comfortable. I wore these on concrete floors while standing for 8+ hours and my feet never once hurt. They are great for walking, and I frequently use them to take my children on walks

Excellent walking shoes. These shoes are so incredibly comfortable. It's like walking on clouds. I took them on a 5+ mile walk through the city and my feet were comfortable the entire time and had no shin splint paint after. Highly recommend these shoes for anyone looking for good walking shoes

Gave some interest to my sweats uniform. Initially, I thought these shoes were pretty tight. I would consider myself to have normal width feet. I’m able to wear a variety of styles in the same size. They definitely took a breaking in period to loosen up. I didn’t experience any rubbing or blisters, it was just tight on the top and sides of my foot. But if you have wider feet, you may benefit from sizing up.  I love the design of this shoe. They’re super artistic and make me feel like I’m in a cartoon. I feel like they’re a conversation piece. I will say that they almost look a little comical when you’re holding them, but when they’re on your feet, they don’t stand out as much as you would think.  As far as comfort, like I mentioned before, they were tight initially. It took a couple days before they stretched and settled with my foot shape. I also could kind of feel the contour of the sole, which I was initially worried about. I thought it would almost be like I was walking on uneven ground. But I don’t notice that anymore. Either my feet got used to it or the foam got compressed.  I love the fabric of the shoe. It’s knit and it just looks nice (I can’t think of another adjective). The swoosh on the sides are subtle and a sort of plastic. They would probably look super cool under a black light. The laces are reflective also.  These are marketed as running shoes, which you can do, but I feel more comfortable in a trainer type sneaker for that purpose. These are more lifestyle/activewear shoes in my opinion. The soles grip well in the front and the heels offer a lot of support and cushion.  The only thing that’s kind of a bummer is that the foam on the sole creases with wear. Since they’re lightweight and not a solid rubber sole, it’s to be expected I suppose. It’s not like someone would really notice and be like “man your shoes are wrinkly,” but it’s just something to note. The soles are off white, which for some reason I feel is more noticeable than if they were just white or black.   Overall, I really like these as a lifestyle shoe. They’ve become my go-to for running errands for polishing up my sweats

Like Walking On A Cloud. I absolutely LOVED these! They are so comfortable! The padding in the shoe cradles your foot like a newborn and they feel so good to walk/run in. My only issue is a cosmetic issue that may not bother anyone else, but unless I’m wearing pants that cover the shoe, they look a little wide. Kind of like a clown shoe. That hasn’t stopped me from wearing them all the time though! I can’t recommend these shoes enough!

Walking in clouds. These shoes are Soo comfortabl! The sole is thick but it’s so soft and squishy as you walk on these shoes, they do run a bit small maybe like half a size as my big toe hit right at the tip of the shoe however it didn’t really bother me much. These are great for walking all day let’s say for a trip at disneyland these are perfect! Again they just run a tiny bit snug. Material seems to clean easily as well and style is everything

Most comfortable shoes ever!. These are the most comfortable shoes I’ve ever worn. Coming off an injury these running shoes are the only shoes I can currently wear that don’t cause my foot to be in severe pain all day. I put them on first thing in the morning and take them off right as I’m getting into bed. They have been a life saver since getting them. They are so “squishy when you walk” it’s most like walking on the squishy ground they make on some playgrounds that has massive give to it, but you get that on all surfaces. These are by far my favorite and most comfortable sneaker I’ve every owned! The design is also very classy and could be worn anywhere

Wonderful sneaker. This is an excellent sneaker. I’m an avid runner and I swapped this sneaker in place of the other sneakers I used in the past. It’s incredibly comfortable, lightweight, and easy to run in. It’s great for both indoors and outdoors and rough terrain

My shoes are better than yours!. When I first opened the box of the Women’s Motiva Running shoes I thought the curvy soles looked very pronounced, but as soon as I tried them on and started walking in them over wood floors I experienced the walking-in-a-cloud feeling. Although I felt a bit unstable at the beginning with the curvy sole because I’m not used to, but once I started walking more in them I got used to the curves very quickly and it even made it easier to take steps while rocking the foot naturally with the movement. Now that I understand the design a little better I can absolutely recommend them.   I normally look for comfortable shoes for running that provide thick cushion and are soft. These are incredibly comfortable and I love the color combination in green/gray and the modern designer-like style.   I’ve been wearing them to the gym and I can say that the pain I was feeling on my right knee is virtually gone after I started wearing these shoes.   The materials used for the construction seem very durable and easy to clean. The fit is true to size for my regular-width feet. The shoe laces stay tied from the time I put the shoes on to the time I take them off.   One thing I would like is to add a pull tab for the heel so I can put them on easier. The only tab is on the tongue, which it’s helpful but it would be nice to also have it on the heel. Speaking of the tongue, it is actually attached to the inner bottom of the shoe, so it stays in place. This feature is very nice and I don’t recall other shoes having that.   These shoes are better, softer than anything else I have ever owned

Zigzag sole. Very nice looking pair of shoes. After trying them on and wearing them around I can say they are comfortable. However the zigzag bottom of the shoes take some getting used too. I felt myself almost as if I were stumbling for the first 10 minutes of wearing the Nike Motiva. You really do feel the zigzag bottom as you walk since most of us are used to flat bottoms. After some walking around I did get used to them. I would not recommend these for working. I’d recommend this pair as a casual everyday going out pair. The classic black and white colorway is always a go-to favorite

Feels nice. These are great.im not to happy about the color as they are white but it's workable. The shoe itself is very comfortable and they hold up very well. My foot fits perfectly in the shoe and I can wear these all day without it hurting my feet. I have used these for running, walking and hiking. I added some water proofing spray to make them more durable but it is not required at all. I really love how these feel on my feet

Great running shoe. When I first opened the box, the style wasn’t personally appealing and not something I’d typically buy. After trying on, I think they looked much better. The first thing you notice is the increased arch support. After wearing all day, they were quite comfortable. They provided above average support and appear to be durable. I would buy them again but possibly in a different color

Very cool design!. These are super unique shoes and specifically help me when walking. They are by far the most comfortable shoes for walking or jogging I have ever worn, which I attribute to the unique design and sole. They hug my feet nicely without wearing blisters on my feet, don’t feel like they are too tight or too loose. I trekked all over a theme park in Florida for 10 hours and my feet felt wonderful through the entire day, my legs didn’t hurt either! These are a must have for walking!

Excellent Pair of Shoes. I loved these running shoes. At first it took a minute to get used to all the foam in the center of the shoe, but after using them I understood the design. My feet did not hurt even after a 5k. The design is simple but the color gives just enough pop

So comfortable!. These shoes are so comfortable! It feels like I’m walking on clouds but with a good support. The only think that doesn’t make it perfect it’s the support on the heels being so high that it puts a bit pressure on the toes, don’t know if its the shape of my feet or the design of the shoes, but it’s still very comfortable. The design and the colors are fun and can easily be used for casual outfits

Great for Planters Fasciitis. If you have Planters Fasciitis like me, RUN, dont walk to get these shoes! The heel support is like no other I have tried. There is something built into the sole of the shoe, right at the arch/ heel that is very comfortable and takes away the pain of my planters fasciitis. This is probably my favorite feature of the shoe and I can literally wear these all day. I also like that these shoes fit more on the wider side than the narrow side, adding to the comfort and the ability to walk in for longer periods.  The heel of this shoe is very cushiony and when I went for a jog, it made it much easier on my joints to land on this cushioned heel. I only rated it a 4 star instead of a 5 because the shoe is a bit on the heavier/ clunkier side and could stand to be a bit more light weight for those who want to speed up their run times.   I found the design of this shoe to be very fun! The Neon green is bright and stands out… And when you are working out, that is the one time you can get away with a color so loud, so that’s when I love to wear it! I would honestly like another pair with a neutral color as well for an everyday wear because it helps my planters fasciitis so much!

Disappointment no such word.... These Nikes are the best I've owned yet! Durability, comfortable and stylish! I can walk in these for days and days! Absolutely give these 10 stars!! Try them yourself you will say the same thing!!

Best shoe!. I am very picky about shoes. They need to fit just right or I would rather go barefoot. Well let me tell you I prefer to wear these Nike Motiva shoes over any other shoe. They are so comfortable, I feel like I am walking on clouds. They are amazing. Normally after wearing tennis shoes for a few hours I am ready to take them off but these I have worn all day and they are still comfortable. They are perfect material that my feet don't get hot either. Nike has knocked it out of the park with these. Also, if you have a wide foot you can totally wear these. Nike usually are very narrow but thankfully my wide feet have plenty of room in these. Perfect walking, jogging or running shoes. I mean I even wear them just to go shopping all day!
Comfortable motiva. Comfortable for everyday wear. They provide a snug fit and the thicker sole provides extra cushion for running

Very comfortable running shoes!. I absolutely love these running shoes, they are very comfortable and were very easy to break in. The cushioning & curve of the soles are perfect, so I haven’t had any issues with sore feet. I also love the green pop of color!

Womens Motiva Running shoe. I have been wanting to start running/jogging for a little while now but I've always struggled with my knees hurting when I've attempted to run or jog. I got these shoes in hopes that they would be a better support for my feet which would also help my knees.  During the time period that I've had these shoes I have not been able to run due to a back injury but I've gone on many walks through my neighborhood and on some trails and they have been great!   The overall design of the shoe is cool. In the beginning I wasn't sure this would be the shoe that I would normally go for. I don't usually wear "funky" looking shoes but I'm glad I stepped outside of my comfort zone because they are actually really cool!  When I first tried them on I was a little skeptical due to the rocking sense you have when you put them on. The heel area is much lower and there is more arch support in the middle. Understanding that these are running shoes, it makes sense. They are like walking on a cloud. These definitely give my feet way more support. The front of the shoe is a little wider that a normal sneaker which I thought was great. I feel like these shoes were made for my feet! After going on my longer walks I haven't had any knee pain and my feet don't feel like I've gone on a long walk. Due to not being able to properly run in these I decided to wear them during a very busy, errand running day. They held up really well and I didn't get that achy feeling in my feet/ankles after a busy day.   I'm only giving these shoes a 4 star rating due to the fact that I haven't used them for running. I hope to take them out for a run one of these days! I feel more confident to try with these shoes

Amazing Running Sneaker. I absolutely love the Women’s Motiva running sneaker. As the mom of a toddler and a six month old, the Motiva is stylish enough to run errands in and supportive enough to work as a proper running shoe.   If you prefer a thicker sock or a slightly looser sneaker, you may want to go up a half size. Also, like most sneakers with a fabric upper, the Motiva will eventually show wear and tear, but it’s a fair trade-off for a stylish and functional sneaker.   I’m working on getting back into shape post-baby, and I want to emphasize how supportive and comfortable the Motiva is for running. It really helped me get back into the swing of running post-partum

Love them!. Most comfortable running shoes I've ever owned! Definitely recommending to everyone I know that enjoys running. I can wear these all day without my feet getting sore and sweaty. Can take a lot of rain water before it gets to your toes and even longer to get to your feet. Good for any activity but helps boost you forward with the way the bottom is designed

Rolling Towards My Next Step. I really love these new running shoes. The color is so vibrant and when it comes to my running apparel, I love that I don't always need my shoes to match my outfit like I would for casual day wear. This makes the green bottoms extra fun to wear on my daily jogs! I think they are very comfortable. I haven't had any issues with blisters during the "breaking in" period, although I do always wear taller socks to protect my heel! The rounded bottoms feel very bouncy and help with my stride - no knee injuries here!

Womens Motiva Running Shoes. These shoes make you fly. I got the green soles with white/greyish mesh. The mesh was breathable. The design on the bottom sole is interesting and unique. There's different patterns on three parts of the sole which makes it easy to walk, run or jogging. As you take the next step it almost pushes you further. There's some cushion on the sole which I thought made these really comfortable. I enjoy wearing them everyday so far. The only thing that bothers me is that on my first wear, the cushion on the sole already creased

Light and feels like I'm flying. With the weather getting warmer, it is perfect to get outdoors to get some fresh air. I enjoy running outdoors a few times a week if the weather is nice. If not nice, I use the treadmill. I usually wear normal/regular width shoes. The shoes is a size 8 and it fits very well and is true to size.  I love the bright green color and the modern look.  It gives it lots of contrast. The materials used are of very high quality materials.  I like that iflt majes melook slightly taller.    My feet did not feel tired after wearing for a whole day and a run. They are truly comfortable. I am definitely pleased with it

Adorably comfortable shoes!. These shoes are beyond comfortable and the cute flower design is everything I wanted in a shoe! I get compliments non stop when I wear them to the gym and for daily errands. Couldn’t have picked a more amazing shoe. They are responsive and comfortable at the HIIT gym I go to and I can go from burpees to running a quick lap with ease

Nice joggers. The design of this shoe is awesome. The neon green colors make them pop. The shoes are comfortable, however wearing them all day hurts your legs. For jogging they are awesome, everyday wear not so much. These fit just right

Comfortable and Breathable. I have been on the hunt for a new pair of running shoes and have recently been trying on many different pairs, none of which I have been impressed with until I tried these on. These shoes are hands down the most comfortable pair I've worn in years! I've recently been having pain in my right knee and hip when I exercise and even when I'm walking my daughter to school, which is part of the reason I have been looking for new shoes. I've been wearing these Women's Motiva Running Shoes for all of those activities and have felt like I'm walking on a cloud with a spring in my step. The pain I had been experiencing is not there when I'm wearing these shoes. The best part is that I didn't have to take time to break them in, the moment I put them on, I felt instant comfort and can wear them all day.  Pros on this shoe: Very comfortable and have a nice breathable material that makes it easy to wear them all day. The shoe laces appear to have a grip on them so they stayed tied when I'm out on runs.  The design of the sole gives the feel like you have forward momentum which makes it easy to get yourself up and running quickly.  Overall trendy design and the material is neutral enough I can wear with a lot of outfits.   The only con I would note is that with the lighter material on the shoe, I've already noticed them getting dirty. I haven't attempted to wash them yet, so I  am unsure of how they will hold up over time in the wash

MUST HAVE !!. The fit of this shoe was perfect ! It was easy to slip into and the feel is definitely comfortable, no problem breaking them in. There was so much cushion it was very satisfying running, jogging and walking. I really liked the design of the shoe as far as the patterns and colors complimenting each other well. Still simple enough for me to style them different ways and really get a lot of use from them. No doubt I could wear these shoes all day ! I'll even sleep in them they're so comfy lol like walking on clouds. I would recommend these shoes especially to people who have had past injuries and need the extra cushion. What I like most about this shoe is the support/ cushion sole while still maintaining a not too bulky shoe. I wouldn't change a thing

Stylish futuristic shoe. I love the look of this shoe. The wavy sole at the bottom looks futuristic in a subtle, sleek and unique way. The shoe is extremely comfortable and can be worn all day long no matter the activity

Expect the unexpected. I admit, I doubted these shoes. When I first tried them on, they felt uncomfortable and bulky but after a few wears, that all changed.   I’ve been using these shoes for long mileage indoor walks (treadmill) and they are fantastic. Not only do I notice a better stride, I am able to keep my overall heart rate lower and increase my pace. I also have noticed more toning of my calf’s as an added bonus!   Don’t sleep on these shoes. While they may not be the most fashionable option, they’re sure to turn heads and support your movement in a positive way!

Ads a little pep in your step. I received this product to try but my thoughts and opinions are my own. When I first opened the box for these Nike Motivas I thought they looked like a “moon shoe”. They are very futuristic looking. The bottom looks almost like an egg carton. I’d love to see this same shoe in an all over darker color. Maybe since they are futuristic looking ad some space quotes/decals. I love to walk so I couldn’t wait to slip into these and see what they added to my walks. My first thought after lacing them up was that they are very spongy yet supportive. When you’re walking it feels like they’re giving you a little assist in every step you take. I tend to get sore heels very easily and I didn’t notice a single pain when wearing these shoes. Even when I stepped onto a rocky gravel trail the shoes maintained optimal comfort. On the weekend I decided to wear them to work so see if it made me feel like I was getting a mini workout in. I’d say that mostly the shoes felt distracting. Because your feel are moving more you are thinking about every step you take. For a walking/running shoe only these are amazing! I definitely have been using them regularly on my daily walks and feel like my strides have been more consistent while wearing these shoes. Maybe it’s in my head but my calves feel like they’re getting more of a workout too

On your marks. These shoes are so comfortable and cute! Got these and felt instantly motivated to start running again. After having my last baby five months ago, I needed something that would offer good support and these worked. They have an incredibly comfortable sole and the laces actually allow me to tighten these up well to get needed support for running. I’ve taken these out walking and running on our neighborhood trails and so far have no complaints. I personally also liked that the platform on these shoes are pretty thick and not white since these sneakers are meant to be my exercise work horse

Love this running shoe. When I opened the box I was excited about the look of the shoe and the colors. I love how comfortable this shoe is.  I can slip these on super fast and go, they’re not too tight. I can wear these shoes casually all day or for walking or running. I do feel like the shoe runs small maybe by a half size but it’s doesn’t bother me any I still wear them all the time!!! If I had to choose I would change that the shoe runs small but everything else about this shoe is wonderful!!!

Best For Running. As someone who loves to jog and go on long walks, this Nike Motiva Running Shoe for Women is the best shoe I have found yet that keeps my feet from hurting after even just a short run.  The curved shaped sole of the shoe is the key, I believe. They are extra “bouncy” under the foot and makes the heel-toe landing so much softer and more comfortable. You can actually feel the shoe “rolling” under the foot as you move. I feel much more steady on my feet when running or jogging in these. They can be worn as causal shoes as well, as they are super cute!! The colors are beautiful. They are light colored with a pop of neon green so they really match anything you want to wear them with.  The design is great also. The toe is wider than most running shoes which also contributes to their comfort.  The only downfalls to these shoes that I have found is that they are not comfortable enough to wear all day, as they start to feel tight about halfway through the day. Also they don’t “sweat” very well so they get damp when they have been used for a long while.  Overall, these shoes are perfect for beginners to running or even just working out (seasoned runners may like them too!)  I would recommend these and I would purchase them as well

On Air. I was thrilled when I tried these shoes on for the first time, I knew they were a perfect match for my feet.  The light gray and white provide the perfect backdrop for the subtle bright hit of neon green to these shoes.  The laces are stiff and firm, matching the exterior perfectly.  Upon putting these shoes on, I loved the way my foot seemed to bounce off the ground when walking.  I had more spring in my step, literally.  They would for sure be comfortable for running, walking, or wearing on your feet all day.  I only wish they fit a little bit better.  They seemed a bit too snug for my foot, although with a few wears would likely stretch out to be better.  I have wider feet and the toe box of these seem to be wide enough for my foot with good space.  Being a young Mom of 3u3, these shoes will definitely help me stay on my feet and run around chasing all my little ones, with no problem and without my feet getting exhausted and tired from being in them.  I look forward to continuing to wear them for my workouts and for my play with my kids

Great running shoe!. These shoes are very comfortable! I love how they have arch support for flat footers like myself, & the cushion! Omgoodness it was so nice to run on the treadmill without aches & pain at variable speeds, lasting at least 30 minutes. The level of comfort was really mind blowing. If running was great, of course walking was also  a pleasant experience, as well as just standing around, which I was really looking forward to doing. I was somewhat anticipating them not being as comfortable since the movement was very little, but they were still great, so wearing them all day was very easy to do. The fit was great except for 1 of them rubbing against my heel, but that was an easy fix with thicker socks. I do however wish they looked a little better. I wasn’t a huge fan of the look, nor the color scheme. Being a sneaker head, & everything having to match, these were a very big disappointment in that aspect because they didn’t go with a whole lot. However, if they are only being worn for working out/running, they are very good & I would definitely recommend. If I changed anything, it would be the colors to make them more appealing, & versatile, & possibly make the cushion not stand out quite as much, but to blend in with the shoe better

Unique design. I tried these shoes for walking and jogging. I really like the fit and feel of this shoe. It was very cushioned and comfortable. When you first put it on it takes some getting used to because the wavy sole shape is so unique. But that feature makes it really comfortable to walk/jog in as it helps roll your foot from heel to toe. My only negative feedback is the look of the shoe- I don't like the neon green. I would prefer something totally neutral

Nike Womens Motiva Running Shoes. The perfect walking shoe! I do not usually run, but I do enjoy a good walk. I have a lot of back, leg, and feet pain with a lot of different shoes, but these do not have that effect on me. They absorb all the shock. It is like you are walking on a cloud. I work in an office setting, and these shoes are comfortable for all day wear. I feel like they may look a little weird/different because they are not usually the kind of shoe I would typically purchase, but they are the most comfortable Nike shoe I have every tried or owned. I would definitely recommend these feet clouds :)

Theme Park Approved. I took a HUGE gamble on these shoes after trying them on once and wore I them to a theme park for the entire day…without a backup plan. I am happy to say that my risk was rewarded by comfort and breathability ALL DAY LONG!!   These shoes feel like a mattress for my feet, they provide great support and cushioning in all the right places. The Flywire cables give a secure and comfortable fit, while the breathable mesh keeps my feet cool and dry. The outsole has a nice grip which provides good traction on both wet and dry surfaces as well. These shoes are very lightweight, making them great for running and they have a muted color base that matches with most clothing. If you’re looking for a shoe to last all day or help you through a long run, these are for you!

Very comfortable. I like the style of these Nike running shoes. They have just the right cushion support for my feet and are very comfortable. I love that they are lightweight and have stretchy fabric material. I wear them for running and when I go for a walk every day

LIKE FLOATING. the shoes are amazing ! Perfect for a beginners (like myself) with every step it almost feels like the shoe is giving you that boost to keep going.. feels like you’re floating with every step. Super comfortable and design is very chic and modern

Wonderful, good quality shoe. These shoes are wonderful! They are light and airy feeling when you wear them, it feels like you are wearing clouds on your feet! I really like the color of them, the neon green is a really nice pop of color and goes well with the gray and isn’t too much to overwhelm the shoes. My only issue is the heel of the shoe is weird, it’s like it is almost unstable in a way that causes your foot to rock back in a way which could be a good thing for running, but since I wear these just for running errands, it isn’t my favorite feature of the shoe.  Other than that one issue, these shoes are definitely comfortable and cute!

These are a must have! Super comfortable!!. I am extremely happy with these Nike Movita Running Shoes!! They are very comfortable, breathable, and provide terrific ankle support! They're true to size and have stretchy like material which I really like! The design is outstanding, very unique! They have a chunky cushioning, and comfortgroove bumps on the outsole. They help to prevent the feet getting fatigued, and it definitely works! My feet do not get fatigued or hurt at all with these!Another thing I really like is the colors! I've received a ton of compliments on these! They are very durable and versatile! I have used these for walking, running, jogging, and daily wear. I will say, I've never had a pair of shoes this comfortable! I am beyond impressed with these! The quality is outstanding! Definitely the best pair of shoes I've tried yet! If your feet get fatigued easy like mine, then these are a must have!

Comfortable walking shoes!. I gave these shoes to my dad for his birthday! He has been using them and enjoying them. So in his words: These shoes are lightweight and extremely comfortable to walk in. (We live in a very walkable city so it's really important to us that we can walk comfortably for long periods.)  I don't know about anyone else's dad, but my dad does not care about design lol. But I think the design of the soles is so fun. The waves really liven up the shoe. I would wear for myself! These shoes catch my eyes more than regular sneaker soles so I think they feel more special as a gift compared to a regularly shaped pair of sneakers

Comfortable and stylish. I love the Nike Women's Motiva running shoe. It is the absolute most comfortable shoe I have worn. The craftsmanship as always with Nike products is top notch and i love how these shoes look and feel.  I mostly use them for walking and biking, they are comfortable I love the contour of the sole of this pair of shoes.  The color on the soles is bright and vivid green and stands out, while the lightweight body is muted to match many workout clothes

A very cushiony teeter totter. This shoe is very cushioned and wide so if you need more space it is great! The one odd thing about this shoe is that the first part that contacts the ground is right at the start of your heel making for a teeter totter like effect. Since more of the pressure is put on one spot on the foot which we do not naturally contact the ground with, with our natural foot structure I definitely would not run in these. With that being said they would be fine for walking short periods or act as a slipper like shoe for purpose

Walking or Jogging Recommended. These shoes are EXACTLY like the description depicts them to be. The toe box is extra wide giving you plenty of movement. The cushioning gave me an extra 1.5" on my height, which I really enjoyed as I am short. The colors of the shoes are spectacular!  They are easy to put on and stay on. The laces do not need to be double knotted as they stay put with a single loop.   My favorite thing about the shoe is the hug around the ankle.  What I didn't like about them was the exaggerated rocker. To be fair, this is what they are intended for. I tried using these as a daily walker, and just felt like I was not stable.   I did try using them for lifting, but I also felt unstable. HOWEVER, I did use them jogging and would highly recommend them for that. They propel you forward, and my stride felt more natural. They are very cushioned which made it a great feel on my joints

Great walking shoe. The Motiva Running shoe is very comfortable! The fabric on the top.of the shoe is thick and soft, almost like putting your foot in a slipper. This is a great shoe for outside running during colder months.  The sole of the shoe has great arch support. It did take several days to break the shoe in to make sure it was comfortable, but after that I loved wearing them.  This is not a shoe I would use at work or somewhere I would be standing in one place. The bottom of the shoe is curved making standing flat impossible... this shoe is meant to be in motion!

Good Style Shoe. I really like this shoe. It fit comfortably and is true to size. I normally wear a size 8 and this size 8 was perfect. The design of the shoe I thought was really cool. I love the wave pattern on the bottom of the shoe and the inside material is really soft. The shoe also almost has a memeory foam like fit to it. Which i really liked. I love the bright green soles and how there is just accents of that same green all over the shoe to tie the whole look together without being over powering. This shoe has a very high arch support and you can feel all the ripples from the wave design when you walk. Which depending on what you're doing could get annoying. I mainly wear mine to walk/jog with my dog around the neighborhood so it was fine for my needs. So although the shoe is comfortable and could easily be warn all day. Depending on how much arch support you need or if feeling the ripples would annoy you, would depend on how long you would want to wear them. If I could personally change one thing about the shoe I would lessen the arch support a little and maybe change out the laces. I like the look of them they are just very stiff. Overall a nice shoe

Very comfortable walking/running shoe. I really enjoy the shoe and it is extremely comfortable. I work on my feet and was able to be up and walking around with no pain throughout the day. They are very comfortable and made me feel as if I could walk forever. I would highly recommend for walking or running shoes for anyone looking for something with a lot of cushion and a little bit of spring through the mid foot area

Super Plush. These shoes were very, very plush and bouncy! I don't typically wear very thick soled shoes so this was a fairly new experience for me. I was initially worried that the shoes would feel awkward with how thick the shoes were but it was a super easy adjustment. After wearing them for a while, they were very comfortable to wear during walks on pavements. I tried wearing them on a trail and I don't think they were very well suited for that kind of walking as they didn't have much grip on dirt.   I thought that the shoes were very breathable and the material of the upper was very soft and also had a plushness to them. My biggest complaint was that the laces were super slippery and came untied often if not doubled knotted. But laces can be replaced and these shoes were still very comfortable walking shoes.  I also really loved the pop of neon on the soles with the gray upper! I feel like I can wear these shoes with any outfit. Like if I needed to go from a meeting right into needing to walk somewhere.   I did notice that the thickness of the sole did deflate rather quickly so I am worried that the shoes will have to be replaced soon but we'll see

Like walking on a cloud. If there were such a thing as walking on a cloud, I would have to say that the Motiva Nike shoe fit the bill! I walk several miles a day for my daily routine exercise, along with  some days also hanging out with my five very energetic grandchildren.  Needless to say, I really need to keep my feet comfortable so that I can participate in these,  and all other activities that I truly enjoy!  The Motiva Nike  can be worn all day long , and are so extremely comfortable that they truly could be worn instead of slippers !  Along with the comfort, the Motiva is stylish and offers the needed support, to keep your feet happy and healthy everyday !

Fun and Innovative. Nike's Motiva Running Shoes have a very fun look. My pair has a wonderful lime green splash on the tread, which makes for a fun flash of color when I am running. The way the Motiva is built, there is an incline from toe to heel, which propels your foot forward, almost encouraging you to continue on your journey. This incline initially was a little strange to me since I am use to shoes that are flat, but my mind quickly adapted to it as I found it helped me during my running. The cushion on these shoes seems extreme when first looking at them, but once you wear them, you will find that all that cushion feels superb when you are running. I did need to loosen the laces on the shoes as it seemed to be cutting off the circulation in my feet, but I believe that was more of an issue with my feet rather than the shoe itself. I loved how airy and breathable the material is! Perfect for anyone, but especially those who live in hotter climates. Overall, a fun and innovative running shoe

All Day Comfort!. I couldn’t love these shoes more. As a pregnant healthcare worker who is on my feet all day, finding a supportive, stylish and comfortable shoe seems like an insurmountable feat. I LOVE these sneakers. They give me the extra pep in my step and keep me comfy all day.   If you want a supportive all day wear, BUY THESE SNEAKERS

Hug for your foot. This shoe feels AMAZING. It's like a hug on your foot. The sizing does run a bit small, I am normally an 8/8.5, but probably should have gotten a 9 in these. Even though they are small, I was able to walk around in them. Running was a no go, just because they are a bit small. Besides the sizing, I do wish there were more options for colors. I will say that as soon as there are more options, I am ordering another pair!

Very useful for standing/walking around. These shoes are super comfortable and the design is sleek. I mainly using these for rotations in the hospital because I need to be on my feet, standing, and walking around. For fit I’d say it’s true to size and it feels comfortable and breathable. I like the cushion these provide. In terms of design I got the black and white color way and it’s great for the setting I’m going to use it in. I was able to wear these the whole day and my feet were supported the entire time. One thing I would change is the material of the white heel because it creases immediately upon trying to put the shoe on (shown in the pictures). Idk if that’s supposed to be the look but compared to it fresh out of the box, the crease kind of ruins the look

Great recovery shoe. What did you think about the fit and feel of this shoe? The fit was 1 to 1 and runs true to size. The feel is great. It is a very comfortable and cushioned shoe. Feels very soft as soon as you put it on.   What did you think about the design of this shoe? The shoe has a very sleek and bold design. Definitely a stand out design for the midsole. It is sporty and eye catching.   Was this shoe comfortable enough to wear all day long? The shoe is definitely a shoe you can wear all day. It is a great recovery shoe. If you are a runner and want a go to shoe to recover with, this is it. For a non runner, it is a shoe you can wear and feel confident and comfortable in. The cushion is a stand out feature. I’d say this shoe is ideal for anybody who does a lot of walking or has a job that is demanding and keeps you on your feet.   What did you like most about this shoe? What would you change? The cushion was my favorite part about the shoe. It is very noticeable as soon as you put the shoe on. As a very active person, I know I can rely on consistent comfort from the cushion this shoe provides.   The only thing I’d change on the shoe are the materials. It appears to be fully synthetic materials and over time I don’t believe they will hold well against the  elements

Love love LOVE these!!. Oh my goodness, I am obsessed with these shoes on looks alone!!! They are so beautiful in person, I was so excited for them when I opened the box. The unique design and pop of color is incredibly stylish and they look great on too.   As far as the fit, I am usually a women's 10 and these were still comfortable but felt a little bit tighter compared to other styles by Nike. The soles are soft, cushy, and very supportive and comfortable.   Regarding functionality, these sneakers are incredibly durable and again the sole is thick and supportive. Given that the thick sole is soft, there was definitely some noticeable creasing on the sides after the first few uses compared to out of the box, but this is to be expected. Still, if you're wearing these for cosmetic purposes, you may want to look out for that.   Another thing I'll say is as a runner, I feel that if your intent is speed, these sneakers are for you as the springy soles will certainly give you a bit of bounce. They are a bit heavier than some of Nike's other styles, but it's not too noticeable. Personally, I love to walk and feel that these are perfect for me as there is not as much pressure on my feet!

Unique, foamy walking shoes that just need a little breaking in. Fit and feel – These shoes fit securely to my feet while still providing plenty of room for my toes to move around. I appreciate the combination of support and freedom. The extra thick foam soles felt like walking on a cloud. The curved nature of the sole took a little getting used to, but after a day of wearing them, it felt natural.   Design – I like the understated white/grey coloring of the upper with the little pop of fun bright green color. The look and feel of the outsole is really cool and seems innovative compared to other walking/running shoes out there.   Comfort – Because the ankle area is high and snug, I experienced some rubbing and could not wear them for a full day at first. The rubbing was more pronounced on one foot than the other, so this might be dependent upon each wearer’s ankle shape. While wearing the shoes, they were comfortable and I could stand and walk around for a long time. I think that over time, my ankles would adjust to the shape and the shoe would conform to my body a little better and I would be able to wear them for longer periods of time.   Pros & Cons – My favorite aspect of the shoe is the outsole. It is really interesting to look at, and the curved and foamy nature makes me want to keep moving. I would perhaps make the curve a little less pronounced because I felt like when I bent over to pick something up I was just going to keep going and topple over, but I would probably get used to that in time. If you are concerned with the appearance of the foam, be warned that it does take on wrinkles fairly quickly after wearing, but it doesn’t seem to affect the functionality of the shoe at all.  One other improvement I would like to see would be the addition of a heel strap to aid in putting the shoe on. I do also like that the laces have reflective stripes built in. Initially I didn’t like how rough the laces felt, but I think the added security of the reflection in the laces, which is very useful for road walking/running, is worth it. Also, the holes the laces go through are thin slits, so the laces won’t be coming undone any time soon. Overall, I think this is a very well designed shoe that, once broken in, will be comfortable for a long time

Wow. These are absolutely amazing! They literally feel like I'm walking on a cushioned cloud. I can feel the support in my arch but not in a bad way rather in a great way! I am always chasing my toddlers around and these make my feet feel sooo much better in all ways. Easy to put on, lave up and move in. The color is beyond simple and cute. All around amazing shoe!

Awesome running shoes. These shoes were actually really nice to run in. The way the sole is designed almost gives a bounce affect that helps boost your momentum. Pretty comfortable to even work in if you’re on your feet all day. They do run a bit small. I’m usually a size 8 and they fit like a 7.5. Overall cool shoe to be active in

Comfortable!. These shoes are so comfortable!! They are like walking on marshmallows. At first it's harder to balance, but that's only a couple minutes. The shoe laces are different but I like them! My feet can breath in them. My feet haven't been sweaty so far in them. They fit perfectly and haven't given me any "new shoe discomfort" like a lot of my past shoes. They are comfortable to run in too. Also green is my FAVORITE color so I love that the bottoms are green and that there are little pops of green by the laces too. One of my favorite designs so far!

Comfortable, but not for my feet. The Motiva shoes are roomy and very cushioned. These shoes truly feel like you’re walking on a pillowy surface. Every part of the shoe is very well padded and does not require any breaking in. They are also probably the roomiest Nike running shoes I have ever tried. I occasionally need to go up half a size for sneakers, but these fit true to size and I was able to take my usual size. The mesh upper fabric is lightweight and breathable. What makes these shoes special is their soles. They have a unique curved/rocker shape to them. It doesn’t look very dramatic in person, but you definitely feel it as soon as you put them on. As a result, I felt off balance wearing these shoes particularly when standing still. I would have to shift my weight to adjust my center of gravity and it was kind of tiring. It definitely took some getting used to, but the feeling is reduced when I start moving. I think the rocker design of the sole feels most comfortable when I’m in constant motion. Due to the shape of the sole, it feels like I am being propelled forward with each step. Additionally, the insole feels thickest at the arch, then dips at the heel and ball, and angles up again in the toes and back of the heel. However, as someone with flat feet, the high arch support in the shoes was too much for me. It feels like my feet are not able to make complete contact with the insoles. I would recommend this style for people with high arches for use dedicated to walking and/or jogging. I would not choose these for day to day life running errands where I am more likely to be standing still for periods of time
Very comfortable. I love the way they fit perfectly and they are very comfortable and the style is great.. would definitely recommend these especially to the runners

Comfortable shoes. These shoes have incredible cushioning, they feel pillowy soft underfoot. The sole is curved which helps with a rolling stride while you walk. They are pretty cool looking as well since the soles are lime green and contrast nicely with the grey/white upper. The upper is knit mesh and it keeps your feet cool while working out. There is good cushioning and support, and I can wear these all day

REALLY comfortable. These womens Motiva running shoes are amazing! First off, it’s very comfortable. I am a heel walker, meaning I put most of my weight on my heels when walking which results in heel pain. As soon as I started wearing these I noticed a huge difference. The exaggerated rocker put a bounce to my step and allowed the weight to be shifted off my heels. I have not had any heel pin since wearing these. I also find myself being more active because it’s actually fun to just walk/run in them. These are definitely my go to running shoes. They are also very light weight. The design is a little different than I normally wear with the larger sole, but I did like how the top part of the shoe is slender and flexible to fit my foot well. I would recommend these shoes to anyone. I may even buy the other color

Winning Shoes!. I absolutely love my Nike Women's Motiva running shoes and would give them a glowing 5-star review! These shoes provide a wonderfully supportive fit that keeps my feet feeling secure and comfortable, even during long runs. The cushioning throughout the shoe, especially in the heel, is top-notch and really helps to absorb impact and prevent any discomfort.  Not only are these shoes functional, they're also sleek and modern in design, making them a stylish addition to my workout and casual wardrobe. The breathable materials keep my feet cool and dry, even on hot days, and I find them comfortable enough to wear all day long - whether I'm running, playing pickleball, or just doing errands around town.  Finally, I've received so many compliments on these shoes! They're definitely eye-catching and have sparked conversation with other athletes and shoe-lovers alike. Overall, I highly recommend the Nike Women's Motiva running shoes to anyone looking for a supportive, comfortable, and stylish shoe to take them from workouts to everyday wear

Walk or run these are number 1!. The Nike Motiva walking shoes are top-notch! They are the most comfortable walking and running shoe around. I have taken the shoes on path walks outside and runs in the gym and I couldn’t be happier. The rocker sole is incomparable to any other shoe on the market and makes running and walking feel like your on a cloud. I feel lighter and better supported when wearing these shoes, and the impact on my body is greatly reduced. I plan on buying this shoe again as I haven’t had a shoe that has been truly versatile from the streets to the gym!

Motiva. Motiva must be short for motivated… Because that’s exactly what they do when you put these running shoes on. I am utterly amazed with not only the comfort of the shoe, but the way they make your feet feel when you’re in them (they’re my new daily faves). Don’t judge these too harshly, their design is a bit bold, but that’s what makes them wonderful (If you’re anything like me, bold colors and designs are my first choice!). If you’re hesitant at all, I’m here to assure you not to be! They are a wonderful daily shoe in addition to what they were designed for, with a sole that brings endless comfort to your feet

Nike Motive. The fit and feel: fit feels like you could roll an ankle but once you’re moving/running it felt stable. The upper hugs the foot just enough for stability and is super soft. The rocking feeling took some time getting used to.  The design: the sole sits a bit high and is noticeable.  The cushion is outstanding and was very comfortable. I could wear this for an 8 hour day.  I liked the look of the upper on foot.   I would change the height of the sole. It is noticeably high and gives the appearance you’re trying to be taller
